programme.desc: Old friends Dr Sloan and private investigator Joe Mannix are thrown together to unravel a case of corruption linked to an unsolved murder. Guest starring Mike Connors as the veteran TV detective(n)

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: Gibbs and the team investigate when naval cryptanalyst Andrew Wells is shot dead in a park outside Baltimore. At the scene, Tony spots a man who was one of his informants from 15 years earlier when he was a police officer, but who went into hiding after a bid to bring down the Russian mobsters he worked for went wrong. Drama, starring Mark Harmon(n)

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: The team works with Abigail Borin of the Coast Guard Investigative Service after a highly suspicious explosion and fire on board an oil rig kills a US marine corps reservist. Abby detects malware in the platform's computer systems, while Ducky finds traces on the victim's body that lead to a lawyer who works for the oil company. Back in the office, a prankster is bringing some light relief and although the likeliest suspect is Tony, he denies any involvement. Crime drama, guest starring Diane Neal(n)

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: Gibbs is forced to take a step back from work when his increasingly frail father Jackson begs him to help track down an old friend from the Second World War who does not have long left to live. Meanwhile, the rest of the team investigate the death of a marine sergeant who appears to have been caught in the crossfire during a bungled robbery, but Tony and Tim find evidence the victim may have been targeted. Crime drama, guest starring Ralph Waite (The Waltons), with Mark Harmon(n)

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: Petty officer Jody Ray is killed by a hit-and-run driver and evidence points to staff sergeant Justin Dunne, whose guilt seems certain when DiNozzo and McGee find him washing a bloodstained knife when they go to arrest him. However, Dunne tells his lawyer Carrie Clark he was miles away in Falls Church at the time - stabbing bookmaker Donny Sullivan to death. Unable to reveal the truth to the NCIS team, Clark decides to check out the alibi herself. Crime drama, guest starring Salli Richardson-Whitfield (A Town Called Eureka)(n)

programme.desc: Jane Boulton struggles to overcome her fear of heights to play Cupid for a passenger who's hoping his 40ft banner will persuade his girlfriend to accept his proposal. Meanwhile, pilot Tony Underwood steps out from the cockpit to help two autistic boys get to grips with flying(n)

programme.title: Holby City
programme.desc: A flamboyant new plastic surgeon joins the team, earning Will's disapproval almost immediately, and attempts to pay a shocked Tricia for helping him. Donna fails to pay the rent yet again, but this time Lisa has had enough and orders her out immediately(n)

programme.title: The Bill
programme.desc: Although she and Dale are rescued from the Radfords' murderous clutches, Kerry's problems are just beginning as Gina gets wind of her undercover mission and vows to end her career in the force. A heated argument between Adam and Rob ends with the latter being issued a formal warning, and Sam fears the worst when her teenage daughter Abi goes missing. A paedophilia case reopens old wounds for Terry - but can he explain to a shocked Ramani why he accessed a child pornography website?(n)

programme.title: The Bill
programme.desc: As all attempts to locate Abi Nixon prove fruitless, Sam begins to panic - could her daughter have been abducted, committed suicide or even faked her own death? Terry hands in his resignation to Ramani and wrestles with demons from his past as his brother Ben confesses that he too had been sexually abused as a child. Yvonne gives troubled teenager Shirley a stern lecture after she steals money from Dean, only to bite her tongue on learning the wayward youngster has been diagnosed HIV-positive(n)

programme.title: Classic EastEnders
programme.desc: Nick confesses to Dot that he murdered Eddie Royle. Dot calls the police and Nick gets taken away. The whole Square are waiting for news of Clyde(n)

Two men attend a roleplay meeting, but chaos ensues during a pretend fight when one bites off the other's forefinger(n)

programme.title: Lovejoy

programme.title: Hi-de-Hi!

programme.desc: Young Mr Grace instructs everyone to wear fancy dress in the run-up to Christmas, turning the departments into fairy-tale grottos. Festive edition of the department store comedy from 1975, with Harold Bennett, John Inman and Mollie Sugden(n)

programme.title: 'Allo 'Allo!

programme.title: Inspector George Gently
programme.desc: The detective looks into the suspicious death of an old friend and informant. The investigation leads him to the local police station, where it becomes clear the officers are hiding something - and to complicate matters, the disappearance of a teenage boy is also linked to the case. Crime drama, with Martin Shaw, Lee Ingleby and guest stars Neil Pearson, Dean Lennox Kelly and Mark Benton(n)

programme.title: Silent Witness
programme.desc: Double bill. A rising star in the Essex police force is found beaten and shot in his burnt-out car in what proves to be an emotional case for his colleagues. The team helps DCI Jim Sullivan, the detective charged with bringing the killer to justice, and it isn't long before suspicion falls on Dean Fallon - a local drug dealer and the son of a known crime boss. But when he proves to have a solid alibi, the investigation shifts closer to home. Starring Emilia Fox and David Caves, with James Alexandrou and Jason Watkins(n)

programme.title: Lovejoy
programme.desc: Feature-length festive episode from 1992. A violent attack on an elderly Czech fighter pilot leads Lovejoy and Eric to hunt for missing diamonds in Prague, and the pair are soon joined by Jane, who was holidaying in Austria with friends. Meanwhile, Tinker is left to make preparations for Christmas. Guest starring Donald Pleasence, with Ian McShane and Dudley Sutton(n)

programme.title: Catherine Cookson's The Girl
programme.desc: Feature-length period drama, starring Siobhan Flynn. A dying woman takes her daughter to the home of her former lover, a wealthy mine agent, who takes the child in. But the man's wife is less than happy about the arrangement and determines to keep the girl apart from her own offspring. With Jonathan Cake, Mark Benton and Susan Jameson(n)

programme.title: Call the Midwife
programme.desc: Boxing Day sees heavy snowfall covering the country and the adverse weather causes major disruption across Poplar as roads become blocked and pipes freeze meaning families have to queue outside for water from standpipes. Sister Julienne must inform a family about the death of their loved one and uncovers an uncomfortable truth, while Valerie helps an unmarried couple living in a caravan prepare for their baby, but unforeseen complications knock her confidence in her ability as a midwife. Guest starring Anita Dobson(n)

programme.title: Call the Midwife
programme.desc: The nuns and midwives move into their new premises following the explosion that wrecked the old Nonnatus House, and are joined by fresh arrival Sister Winifred - a kindly-but-naive young woman. Jenny becomes concerned about new mother Merle's mental state and the welfare of her baby, who isn't feeding properly. Dr Turner believes it could be something more serious - although the mystery is eventually solved by the last person anyone would have expected. Chummy is struggling to adjust to her new role as a housewife and mother, and organises an open day at the community centre. Jessica Raine, Stephen McGann and Miranda Hart star(n)

programme.title: Call the Midwife
programme.desc: Trixie's feathers are ruffled when Jenny is promoted, but the new Acting Sister has more to worry about after a mother-to-be reveals the baby she is carrying was not fathered by her husband - and to complicate matters, the real father is black. Cynthia is inspired by a lecture on natural childbirth, convinced it will help an overly anxious patient, while Alec and his friends try to persuade Jenny to join them on a CND march. Jessica Raine, Helen George and Bryony Hannah star in the 1950s-set nursing drama(n)

programme.title: The Lady Vanishes
programme.desc: It is 1931 and socialite Iris Carr (Tuppence Middleton) is travelling back from a holiday in the Balkans, but faints on the platform of the railway station in the scorching heat. She is comforted by fellow passenger Miss Froy (Selina Cadell), but when Iris falls asleep she awakes to find the woman has disappeared and everyone else on board denies ever having seen her. With only handsome traveller Max Hare (Tom Hughes) for support, Iris maintains that Miss Froy has somehow been abducted - even though it increasingly appears to be a delusion on her part. Mystery, also starring Keeley Hawes, Gemma Jones, Stephanie Cole and Julian Rhind-Tutt. Adapted from Ethel Lina White's novel, The Wheel Spins(n)

programme.title: Father Brown
programme.desc: The priest finds himself embroiled with MI5, which puts Lady Felicia in a compromising position - will she betray her friend to protect secrets from her own past? Drama, starring Mark Williams and Nancy Carroll(n)

programme.title: Death in Paradise
programme.desc: Millionaire environmentalist and scientist Dan Hagen is shot on his boat while out at sea, and all the evidence points toward a robbery gone wrong, but DI Goodman suspects foul play by a crew member. The team soon realises the group are not as close-knit as they initially seem, and with everyone hiding a secret, the pressure is on to get to the bottom of how and why Dan was killed. The case gives the British detective a sudden desire to become a sailor, while Florence surprises the team with her action hero credentials. Caribbean crime drama, starring Kris Marshall and Joséphine Jobert(n)

programme.title: Silent Witness
programme.desc: The apparent suicide of a DJ leads Nikki to question her judgement in a strikingly similar case from her past and she brings the potential mistake to the attention of her colleagues, but the news threatens to have repercussions for the family of the deceased, the police and the Lyell Centre. The fresh evidence leads to the conclusion that a copycat killer is at large and Nikki finds evidence that an intruder has been entering her home. Feature-length episode of the drama, starring Emilia Fox(n)

programme.title: The White Princess
programme.desc: Sequel to The White Queen, set in the Middle Ages and picking up as the tumultuous War of the Roses comes to an end, a new generation ascends to the throne in a tale of power, political clashes, family, love and betrayal. As the victor of the Battle of Bosworth, Henry Tudor, is set to ascend the throne and Elizabeth of York and her family, supporters of the former King, find themselves in grave danger. Lizzie must fulfil her promise to marry King Henry VII and bring peace to the nation. Jodie Comer, Jacob Collins-Levy, Suki Waterhouse and Michelle Fairley star(n)

programme.desc: Hugh struggles to prove his innocence and win back Penny after failing a drug test. Meryl and Charlie lock horns over Hayley's entry in the Miss Whyhope competition(n)

programme.title: The Bill
programme.desc: As June and Jim prepare to tie the knot, the past threatens to catch up with both of them and shatter their happiness. Evil Gabriel plays mind games with the pair, suggesting the marriage is merely a sham, while Jim's drunken ex-wife Marie makes an unscheduled appearance - but will love conquer all? The romance of the occasion goes to Reg and Marilyn's heads, while back at the station, Adam gets lured into a trap that could destroy his career(n)

programme.title: The Bill
programme.desc: Still working undercover, Kerry gets in way over her head after witnessing the death of a Radford escort girl and being ordered to give one of the others a beating, and Rob begins to fear the worst when she goes for days without reporting back. As Neil's relationship with Andrea blossoms, he lets slip some of his most closely guarded secrets about his colleagues - not least big cheese Adam Okaro - which soon end up on the front pages of the newspapers. Gina is distraught to discover Jonathan has requested a transfer to another station(n)

programme.title: The Bill
programme.desc: Dale realises that Kerry has embarked on a foolhardy undercover mission to investigate the Radford clan and tracks her down, begging her to pull out before it's too late - but she turns a deaf ear to his pleas, putting both their lives in peril. Newlyweds Jim and June return to Sun Hill to be met by a mob of journalists baying for Adam's blood, while Reg begins to have second thoughts about pursuing a relationship with Marilyn(n)

programme.title: The Bill
programme.desc: Although she and Dale are rescued from the Radfords' murderous clutches, Kerry's problems are just beginning as Gina gets wind of her undercover mission and vows to end her career in the force. A heated argument between Adam and Rob ends with the latter being issued a formal warning, and Sam fears the worst when her teenage daughter Abi goes missing. A paedophilia case reopens old wounds for Terry - but can he explain to a shocked Ramani why he accessed a child pornography website?(n)

programme.title: Where the Heart Is
programme.desc: The threatened closure of Goddard's following the outbreak of a virus among the children of Skelthwaite prompts Vic to speculate on the real source of the contamination. Meanwhile, Simon and Anna have relationship problems. Rural drama, starring Lesley Dunlop and Leslie Ash(n)

programme.title: Where the Heart Is
programme.desc: Intrigue and frustration are the order of the day as Anna and Karen come to terms with the possibility that a patient may be suffering domestic abuse. Jess finally gets what's coming to her, while Dick, Cheryl and Oscar struggle to settle into family life. Drama, starring Lesley Dunlop, Leslie Ash and Phil Middlemiss(n)

programme.title: Where the Heart Is
programme.desc: The Skelthwaite Scorpions hop across the Channel for a match with their twin-town team. The competition doesn't take up all their time, however, as Vic finds his uncle's war grave. Simon, meanwhile, has a rendezvous with a local businesswoman and Chris falls for a hiker(n)

programme.title: Call the Midwife
programme.desc: Sister Julienne receives an SOS from Holloway Prison, whose usual maternity workers have been struck down by illness, and when she and Trixie step in to help, the nun puts her reputation on the line to prevent a heavily pregnant convict having her unborn baby taken away by social services. Shelagh faces heartache when a routine pregnancy check reveals something far more serious, Alec has a confession for Jenny, and Fred takes the gang to the theatre to celebrate Chummy's birthday - only for the trip to end in disaster. Lacey Turner, best known as EastEnders' Stacey Branning, guest stars(n)

programme.title: Call the Midwife
programme.desc: Jenny has an eventful few days, starting with a patient who as well as having herself to worry about, is also struggling to cope with her mother, an agoraphobic who hasn't been outside for at least 12 years. On top of that, Alec asks the midwife to accompany him to Brighton for the weekend, leaving her wondering if his intentions are strictly honourable. However, things soon take a tragic turn. Meanwhile, Shelagh joins the local choir to take her mind off her problems. Jessica Raine, Leo Staar and Laura Main star(n)

programme.title: Call the Midwife
programme.desc: The nuns and midwives are busy preparing for Sister Evangelina's surprise jubilee celebrations, marking 50 years since she took her vows, but a face from the past threatens to ruin the party for the guest of honour. It's back to business when a young woman with Down's syndrome is brought in feeling unwell. To everyone's surprise, they discover she is six months pregnant, causing some of them to think the worst, and the staff are joined by new nurse Patsy, whose sense of humour and no-nonsense attitude make her an instant hit(n)

programme.title: Call the Midwife
programme.desc: Trixie is chuffed when local curate Tom invites her to join him for a day of cricket, sending her to work with a spring in her step. Is love on the cards for the young midwife? Shelagh's infertility has made her think long and hard about what she wants in life, so she approaches her husband with an idea, while Patsy upsets a young mother in the clinic and is moved to the district rota, where she works tirelessly to diagnose a docker's unusual symptoms(n)

programme.title: Are You Being Served?
programme.desc: The staff of Grace Brothers stage a life-size Punch and Judy show to entertain a group of their colleagues' children. Christmas special of the vintage comedy, starring John Inman(n)

programme.title: Father Brown
programme.desc: The priest investigates when the new wife of Sir Raleigh is found dead in a locked room after seeing an Egyptian mummy. Crime drama, starring Mark Williams(n)

programme.title: Death in Paradise
programme.desc: The island is rocked when Saint Marie's governor Caroline Bamber drops dead at her leaving party, with the commissioner standing right next to her. As DI Goodman and the team try to deduce how she could have been poisoned without their boss noticing any foul play, they find themselves entering the murky world of island politics, where blackmail, threats and corruption seem commonplace - fuelled by ongoing tension between the French and British. Meanwhile, Humphrey braves the world of online dating, under the guidance of ladies' man Dwayne - and soon finds his perfect match. Lucy Cohu and Nigel Lindsay guest star(n)

programme.title: Silent Witness
programme.desc: The murder of Amir Aziz, a prominent anti-fundamentalist Muslim, drags the Lyell team into the murky world of hate-crime and counter-terrorism. Initially thought to be the work of a EDL member whose son was killed by the Taliban, the team begin to suspect the killing is connected to Sarah Begovic, a young woman who left the UK to relocate to Syria, but who recently returned home in secret with her six-month-old son. Feature-length episode of the crime drama, starring Richard Lintern(n)

Meanwhile, Brenton West fixes a much-loved powder compact, made in the shape of a piano. Eric and Cyril have a fall out over a lost compass, while Mr Newbold falls in and gets a soaking on a boat trip with Mrs Rossi. The canny grocer has his work cut out getting friends to make up and getting a wet customer home without being spotted by 'Black Widow' Mrs Featherstone. Comedy, starring David Jason, Stephanie Cole, Tim Healy, Johnny Vegas and Sue Holderness(n)

As usual, the participants set out to hoodwink their opponents with absurd facts and plausible fibs about themselves in a bid to secure a team victory, through rounds including Home Truths and Quick-fire Lies. Savvy viewers may have noted that after 12 series, both Mitchell and Mack are running woefully short of truthful bizarre experiences to recount of themselves(n)

programme.title: The Graham Norton Show

Ruth Jones and Rob Brydon, reunited for the much-anticipated Gavin & Stacey Christmas special, also appear. programme.title: Match of the Day
programme.desc: Gary Lineker presents highlights of the latest Premier League matches, including Manchester City v Leicester City at the Etihad Stadium and Everton v Arsenal at Goodison Park. Last season's corresponding fixture between the Citizens and Foxes was a pivotal one in terms of the title race. Long-serving City captain Vincent Kompany's wonder-goal was the difference between the sides, and meant Pep Guardiola's men only needed one more victory to clinch the title, which they duly accomplished a few days later. Plus, action from Aston Villa v Southampton at Villa Park, Bournemouth v Burnley at the Vitality Stadium, Brighton & Hove Albion v Sheffield United at the Amex Stadium, Newcastle United v Crystal Palace at St James' Park, and Norwich City v Wolverhampton Wanderers at Carrow Road(n)

Plus, action from Aston Villa v Southampton at Villa Park, Bournemouth v Burnley at the Vitality Stadium, Brighton & Hove Albion v Sheffield United at the Amex Stadium, Newcastle United v Crystal Palace at St James' Park, and Norwich City v Wolverhampton Wanderers at Carrow Road(n)

programme.title: Britain's Christmas Story
programme.desc: Gareth Malone and Karen Gibson conclude their special series for Advent exploring Britain's Christmas traditions, unwrapping how the season has been celebrated across the centuries. They discover why a ban on Christmas led to rioting in the streets, and how the festivities were revived with a vengeance in Victorian times. As they trace the stories behind now-common traditions - and take part in less familiar ones such as pub carolling - the Archbishop of Canterbury explains how he celebrates Christmas, and why its meaning remains so relevant today(n)

programme.title: Home (2015)
programme.desc: An alien on the run from his own people arrives on Earth and embarks on an adventure with a daring young woman. It turns out to be a life-changing trip during which they begin to understand the true meaning of the word home. Animated comedy, featuring the voices of Jim Parsons, Rihanna, Steve Martin and Jennifer Lopez(n)

programme.title: Snow Bears
programme.desc: Documentary following polar bears as they travel 400 miles to reach the North Pole. As spring sets in, bears and their cubs must travel north to reach the pack ice, where they will hunt seals. Their journey leads to encounters with all manner of other Arctic wildlife, including reindeer, narwhals, walrus and arctic foxes. Narrated by Kate Winslet(n)

programme.title: Hold the Sunset
programme.desc: Edith and her family celebrate their last Christmas together before she and Phil set off for their dream retirement in the Mediterranean. However, things do not go to plan as Edith's son Roger decides to invite her scurrilous one-time flame Bob to join in with the festivities, and Edith's sister Joan makes it clear to all that she will not be watching the Queen's Speech anywhere else. Meanwhile, Queenie locks Sandra and Wendy into a wardrobe, and Phil finds himself talking to a ghost. Christmas special from 2018, guest starring Annette Badland(n)

programme.title: Songs of Praise
programme.desc: Aled Jones celebrates Christmas with carols from the Assembly Hall in Belfast, including Hark The Herald, and O Little Town Of Bethlehem. With guests Katherine Jenkins, G4, Alexis Ffrench and The Lion King star Shaun Escoffery(n)

programme.title: Toy Story (1995)
programme.desc: A jealous string-pulled cowboy doll's status as his owner's favourite plaything is threatened by the arrival of a charismatic hi-tech astronaut figure, who refuses to believe he is simply a toy. However, the rivals are forced to work together when they are left stranded in the outside world. Pixar animated adventure, featuring the voices of Tom Hanks, Tim Allen, Don Rickles and Jim Varney(n)

programme.title: Penguins of Madagascar (2014)
programme.desc: Heroic flightless birds Skipper, Kowalski, Private and Rico uncover a plot to take over the world. Needing help to foil the evil scheme, they seek out a secret society of animal agents, led by a heroic wolf. Animated comedy spin-off, with the voices of Benedict Cumberbatch, John Malkovich and Tom McGrath(n)

programme.title: Merry Madagascar
programme.desc: The animals deliver Santa's presents after he crash-lands on the island, but they plan to use the good deed as an excuse to get back to New York City. Animated adventure, with the voices of Ben Stiller, Chris Rock, David Schwimmer and Jada Pinkett Smith(n)

programme.title: The BFG (2016)
programme.desc: An orphaned girl befriends a benevolent giant, who takes her off to a magical land, where they attempt to stop the man-eating creatures that are invading the human world. Steven Spielberg's fantasy adventure based on Roald Dahl's book, starring Mark Rylance, Ruby Barnhill and Penelope Wilton(n)

programme.title: Countryfile
programme.desc: John Craven and the team visit Tyntesfield in North Somerset - a stately pile that celebrates Christmas in high Victorian style. John meets the staff getting the place spruced up, and he gets measured up for his own period outfit. Anita Rani tries her hand at making eco Christmas cards, Steve Brown creates decorations based on Victorian originals, while Ellie Harrison discovers the estate's veteran trees and learns about the novel way they are protected from livestock(n)

programme.title: His Dark Materials
programme.desc: As the Magisterium closes in, Lyra learns more about Asriel's rebellion, but her assistance to him comes at great personal cost. The adaptation of Philip Pullman's fantasy adventure novel series reaches its conclusion. Starring Dafne Keen, Ruth Wilson, James McAvoy and Gary Lewis(n)

programme.title: A Christmas Carol
programme.desc: In 1843, miserly businessman Scrooge is visited by a ghost from the past on a freezing Christmas Eve and is forced to face the impact of his self-interested, penny-pinching behaviour on his own life and those around him. Peaky Blinders creator Steven Knight's adaptation of Dickens' classic, starring Guy Pearce, Andy Serkis and Stephen Graham(n)

programme.title: Match of the Day 2
programme.desc: Mark Chapman is joined by studio guests to review the day's Premier League action(n)

programme.title: Women's World Cup 2019 Review
programme.desc: A look back at the tournament from France, which saw USA enter as the holders and England look for a strong showing under Phil Neville(n)

programme.title: This Is BBC Two
programme.desc: Preview of upcoming programmes from BBC Two(n)

programme.title: Meet the Street at Christmas
programme.desc: Mark De-Lisser's search for singers takes him to Cardiff's high street and offices, where he meets a young man from the countryside who is struggling to make friends in the city and a widow with a brilliant voice who has not wanted to engage with others since her husband's death(n)

programme.title: Island Medics
programme.desc: Community nurse Jean is out on her rounds as a one-woman health service on the archipelago of Out Skerries, while the paramedics welcome a new recruit for maternity cover(n)

programme.title: Love in the Countryside
programme.desc: Sara Cox heads to Somerset to help give equine dentist Victoria a leg up the love ladder. Victoria adores her country life, but the 35-year-old's dating pool is small and when it comes to men she is incredibly picky. Sara encourages Victoria to be more open-minded and she speed-dates five gents, before inviting her favourite three back to Somerset to sample rural life. Meanwhile, 24-year-old vet George is doing his best to woo the three ladies he's entertaining at his home in Hay-on-Wye, on the Welsh border(n)

programme.title: Victoria Derbyshire
programme.desc: Daily news and current-affairs programme offering discussion of breaking stories, exclusive interviews and audience interaction via social media(n)

programme.title: BBC Newsroom Live
programme.desc: A chance to stay up to date on the day's leading stories, with the latest breaking news as it happens(n)

programme.title: Politics Live
programme.desc: Update on from Westminster and beyond, in the final programme of what has been a remarkably eventful year in domestic politics(n)

programme.title: Eggheads
programme.desc: Jeremy Vine hosts the quiz in which the winners of famous game shows work as a team to tackle a new set of challengers hoping to win a cash prize(n)

programme.title: The Best Christmas Food Ever
programme.desc: Paul Ainsworth and Catherine Fulvio are joined by actress Nina Wadia - Zainab Masood in EastEnders - as they share their culinary secrets, perfect for creating delicious festive flavours for Christmas. Mouth-watering dishes including succulent pork ribs with orange and pomegranate salsa, and pavlova with Christmas pudding ice-cream are prepared(n)

programme.title: Coast
programme.desc: Mark Horton visits Liverpool to view Brunel's famous ship, the Great Eastern, which now lies beneath the mud. Mark recounts the story of her greatest triumph - how she conquered the Atlantic by connecting Britain's edge to America with 2,000 miles of telegraph wire(n)

programme.title: Talking Pictures
programme.desc: A profile of actor David Niven. The documentary highlights the film and television appearances he made over the years and captures the milestones of his fame, including his role as Phileas Fogg in Michael Todd's production of Around the World in 80 Days. Narrated by Sylvia Syms(n)

programme.title: The Bishop's Wife (1947)
programme.desc: Distraught bishop Henry is struggling to cope with building a new cathedral, but receives help from on high in the form of a suave guardian angel. The heavenly visitor proves influential in fundraising, but when he turns his attention to Henry's family life, the cleric suspects his new friend has designs on his wife. Fantasy, starring Cary Grant, David Niven and Loretta Young(n)

programme.title: The Hairy Bikers Home for Christmas
programme.desc: Dave Myers and Si King create an Austrian linzertorte, roast goose and all the trimmings, and a hazelnut chocolate brownie with clementine sorbet, as they find out how guest Aled Jones spends his Christmas. Alongside the recipes and fun, there are also fantastic ideas for home-made edible Christmas presents(n)

programme.title: Richard Osman's House of Games
programme.desc: Comedian Lolly Adefope, journalist and presenter Dan Walker, presenter Sarah Greene and comedian Miles Jupp test their general knowledge skills, with an overall champion being crowned for the week(n)

programme.title: Only Connect
programme.desc: Victoria Coren Mitchell presents the last of three special editions of the quiz. This time, family teams the Lasletts, who appeared on the show in 2013, and the Meeples, from just last year, return to face off in a battle of lateral thinking and connections(n)

programme.title: Mountain Vets
programme.desc: A calf born with an extraordinarily rare condition is brought in to see vet Martin Fitzpatrick at Castle Vets, where head nurse Julie Hurst advises the owners of seven-year-old cat Paws, whose weight has been steadily increasing. Vet Aidan O'Hare heads out to see Limousin bull Navarn, who has mysteriously gone lame. It is a blow to his owners because if he can't be successfully treated, he will have to be sold for meat at a serious loss. At the stud at Tullyraine Equine Clinic, breeder John books his mare Sweetbriar Rose to mate with stallion Conduit in the hope of producing a prize racehorse(n)

programme.title: MasterChef: The Professionals
programme.desc: One-off special in which Monica Galetti, Marcus Wareing and Gregg Wallace catch up with five finalists for whom taking part in the cookery competition has had a career-changing impact, taking them on a gastronomic journey that includes Majorca, the Scottish Highlands and the Devon town of Dartmouth. But it would not be MasterChef: The Professionals without an element of competition, so all five also return to the studio kitchen to show how much their food has changed since they first appeared - and try to prove that theirs is the best(n)

programme.title: A Merry Tudor Christmas with Lucy Worsley
programme.desc: The historian recreates festive traditions from the reign of Henry VIII. With the aid of food historian Annie Gray, she prepares two royal feasts, including a stuffed boar's head served by a choir, and the ancestors of the modern mince pies and Christmas cake. Lucy also gets a taste of the rabble-rousing anarchy of the Lord of Misrule, listens to carol singers performing a song written by Henry VIII himself, and watches a special royal performance involving dancing stags(n)

programme.title: Mock the Week
programme.desc: Host Dara O Briain and regular panellist Hugh Dennis mark the end of 2019 with a special show looking back on the year's events along with unseen material, out-takes and all the usual fun(n)

programme.title: Cunk & Other Humans on 2019
programme.desc: Arguably 2019 wasn't the best year imaginable, but one thing most can agree on is that it happened. Here, Philomena Cunk, Barry Shitpeas and a galaxy of two other new faces look back at events. Comedy, starring Diane Morgan(n)

programme.title: Newsnight
programme.desc: Analysis of the day's events, presented by Kirsty Wark(n)

programme.title: Marianne and Leonard: Words of Love (2019)
programme.desc: The lives of composer Leonard Cohen and his Norwegian muse Marianne Ihlen, whose romance began on the Greek island of Hydra in 1960 as part of a bohemian community of foreign artists, writers, and musicians. This film follows their relationship, from the early days on Hydra, a humble time of 'free love' and open marriage, to how their love evolved when Leonard became a successful musician. Along the way the film tells of the tragedy that befell those that could not survive the beauty of Hydra, the highs and lows of Leonard's career, and the inspirational power that Marianne possessed(n)

programme.title: Panorama
programme.desc: For the past five years, a radical new church has been promising hundreds of young people an escape from gangs and crime and a pathway to salvation through prosperity and success. SPAC Nation, the Salvation Proclaimers Anointed Church, holds services in hotels, conference halls and football grounds and leader Tobi Adegboyega has been courted by politicians and the media for his work in tackling gang violence. But Panorama has discovered how the church's outward show of concern for young people may hide a less than charitable appetite for money. Reporter Greg McKenzie investigates its fundraising activities and speaks to young worshippers who say they've been forced into debt whilst church leaders enjoy lavish lifestyles(n)

programme.title: Seven Worlds, One Planet
programme.desc: David Attenborough looks at the wildlife of Europe, a crowded continent hiding the most surprising animals in pockets of wilderness. Gibraltar Nature Reserve is home to Europe's only wild population of primates, with its Barbary macaques living a life of kidnapping and high drama, while in the cemeteries of Vienna graverobbing European hamsters do battle with one another. Italian mountain villages are the hunting grounds for rarely seen wolves, and lynx lurk in the forests of Spain(n)

programme.title: This Is BBC Two
programme.desc: Preview of upcoming programmes from BBC Two(n)

programme.title: Top Class
programme.desc: Two teams take on the challenge of answering questions(n)

programme.title: This Farming Life
programme.desc: In the Cairngorms, hill farmer Johnny and his son gather in their sheep for pregnancy scanning and mineral dosing on a cold snowy day. Meanwhile in County Down, Northern Ireland, the Rodgers family's cattle are tested by a vet for Bovine TB, and unfortunately find out that six animals are found to be infected, and have to be sent away to slaughter(n)

programme.title: MasterChef: The Professionals
programme.desc: Gregg Wallace presents the first episode of finals week, in which the four remaining contestants must cook for an exclusive gathering of some of the nation's greatest chefs. Each of the contenders takes responsibility for one course of the four-course meal, under the watchful eye of judges Marcus Wareing and Monica Galetti(n)

programme.title: MasterChef: The Professionals
programme.desc: In the penultimate challenge, the four remaining chefs are challenged to create a single exceptional dish, inspired by a place that is special to them, as they fight to secure their place in the final three. After one contestant is sent home, the three remaining chefs travel to Lisbon to experience cooking alongside the acclaimed chef José Avillez. First, they take a trip to an historical food market, where they find ingredients to create their own dish for Chef José to taste, before joining José's brigade of chefs during a packed lunchtime service(n)

programme.title: Newsies: The Broadway Musical (2017)
programme.desc: A performance of the musical filmed at the Pantages Theatre in Hollywood, California. Set in New York City at the turn of the 20th century, the story follows Jack Kelly, a charismatic newsboy and leader of a ragged band of teenage 'newsies', who dream of a better life far from the hardship of the streets. Starring original Broadway cast members Jeremy Jordan, Kara Lindsay and Ben Fankhauser(n)

programme.title: Victorian Bakers
programme.desc: The bakers prepare Christmas recipes from the Victorian era, including twelfth cakes, bread-based punch and mince pies, which would have been filled with beef in wealthy households, while poor families would have used tripe. Historians Alex Langlands and Annie Gray reveal how a riotous midwinter holiday became a more respectable family affair, and how ovens were used to prepare everything from baked decorations to roasts that would feed entire communities(n)

programme.title: Nature's Weirdest Events
programme.desc: Chris Packham presents a fresh selection of unusual events from the natural world, backed up by eyewitness accounts, film clips and input from scientists. He begins by finding out why Spain is under attack from spaceballs, how a penguin became a man's best friend and the origins of a mysterious underwater blob. He also learns how one woman's nose could hold the key to detecting Parkinson's disease and reveals how prehistoric lions could be brought back from the dead(n)

programme.title: Live Equestrian
programme.desc: Clare Balding presents coverage of the sixth day of the Olympia International Horse Show at the Olympia Grand Hall in London, featuring the FEI World Cup Jumping Leg. Great Britain's William Whitaker, riding Utamaro D Ecaussine, took the title last year after a dramatic jump-off, fending off competition from Belgium's Karel Cox and American Laura Kraut(n)

programme.title: Porridge
programme.desc: Fletch plans to bring a bit of Christmas spirit to Slade Prison in the form of his own home-made booze. But when Mackay and Barrowclough uncover the stash in his and Godber's cell, the crafty con seems in danger of spending the yuletide period in solitary confinement. Festive edition of the classic comedy from 1976, starring Ronnie Barker and Fulton Mackay(n)

programme.title: Swallows and Amazons (2016)
programme.desc: Four siblings on holiday in the Lake District discover an island, only to find another group of children have laid claim to it. The rivalry that ensues between the two factions must be put aside when a bigger and more dangerous challenge presents itself. Period drama based on Arthur Ransome's classic novel, starring Rafe Spall, Kelly Macdonald and Andrew Scott(n)

programme.title: Natural World
programme.desc: The nature documentary tells the story of a mother moose bringing up her calf in the wilds of the Canadian rockies. Many challenges lie ahead for the mother and son, not least from the threat of the hungry bears and wolves that live nearby. Film-maker Hugo Kitching sets out to follow the duo through the four seasons, although things take an unexpected turn later in the year with the discovery of a third moose(n)

programme.title: Dad's Army
programme.desc: The vicar holds a Comforts for the Troops Fund bazaar at which Mainwaring finds himself bidding against Pike for a highly prized orange. Surprisingly, the private reveals a stubborn streak that costs the thick-skinned captain an arm and a leg. Christmas edition of the classic comedy originally shown in 1976, starring Arthur Lowe and Ian Lavender(n)

programme.title: Natural World
programme.desc: Hugh Bonneville narrates a documentary looking at the habits of the species and the skills they have developed to survive in a range of environments around the world. The film explores how bears have overcome the challenges of life - from finding food and raising their cubs to confronting rivals and habitat loss - all thanks to brains, brawn and a remarkable ability to adapt. Part of the Natural World strand(n)

programme.title: Dave Allen: God's Own Comedian
programme.desc: A look at the life, work and legacy of Irish comedy writer and performer Dave Allen, who started his career in entertainment as a Butlin's Redcoat. He first found fame as a chat-show host in Australia in the 1960s, before he came to Britain and began a career that took in films, plays and documentaries alongside his award-winning comedy series. Featuring interviews with family and friends including Steven Berkoff, Stephen Frears and Maggie Smith, as well as rare archive material(n)

programme.title: Cunk & Other Humans on 2019
programme.desc: Philomena Cunk is joined by guests to look back at the year. Comedy, starring Diane Morgan(n)

programme.title: Radio 2 in Concert
programme.desc: The singer takes to the stage at the BBC Radio Theatre in London, performing festive songs from his new album The Christmas Present, including a cover version of Slade's Merry Xmas Everybody and current single Time for Change. Robbie also treats the audience to some of his biggest hits, including Feel, She's the One and Angels(n)

programme.title: Behind the Candelabra (2013)
programme.desc: Biopic of pianist Liberace, following his relationship with his younger lover Scott Thorson. Introduced into the flamboyant entertainer's hedonistic world at a Las Vegas show in 1977, Thorson began a tempestuous five-year love affair with Liberace, while maintaining the public illusion of simply being an employee. Directed by Steven Soderbergh and starring Michael Douglas and Matt Damon(n)

programme.title: The Bleeder (2016)
programme.desc: Drama based on the true story of heavyweight boxer Chuck Wepner and his 1975 title fight with Muhammad Ali, which inspired Sylvester Stallone's character and screenplay for Rocky. Starring Liev Schreiber, Elisabeth Moss, Ron Perlman, Naomi Watts, Michael Rapaport and Pooch Hall(n)

programme.title: This Is BBC Two
programme.desc: Preview of upcoming programmes from BBC Two(n)

programme.title: The Instant Gardener
programme.desc: Presenter Helen Skelton and expert garden designer Danny Clarke head to Bradford to breathe new life into a thoroughly overgrown garden lost in time. The aim is that they will get the job completed in just one day for owner Beverley and her family(n)

programme.title: This Farming Life
programme.desc: New entrant crofting couple Lynn and Sandra send their first pigs to slaughter. Raymond's best bull Major is injured in a brawl. The Rodgers hopes of Balmoral show hang on a clear TB test and buffalo farmer Stevie goes shopping in Holland(n)

programme.title: Countryfile
programme.desc: Matt Baker, Margherita Taylor and Steve Brown are in Buckinghamshire, where Matt is with a group of schoolchildren making their very first visit to a farm. Margherita meets the people working hard to preserve some of the UK's last box trees and finds out what's at stake for those that use it to make fine woodwind instruments, while Steve heads to Tiggywinkles wildlife hospital, where he helps return a couple of barn owls to the wild(n)

programme.title: MasterChef: The Professionals
programme.desc: The search for a chef to be crowned MasterChef: Professionals champion 2019 is almost over, as the three finalists face one last challenge. They are given three hours to cook a starter, a main course and a dessert, each of which takes their culinary abilities to a whole new level, with flawless presentation and exciting flavours. Judges Marcus Wareing, Monica Galetti and Gregg Wallace assess their efforts, before deciding the winner(n)

programme.title: Saturday Kitchen Best Bites
programme.desc: Highlights from throughout the series, offering viewers a chance to revisit some of their favourite moments from previous years in the kitchen. Presented by Matt Tebbutt(n)

programme.title: The Sweet Makers
programme.desc: From candy canes and sugar mice to yule logs and chocolate coins, sweet treats are an integral part of Christmas celebrations. Guided by food historian Dr Annie Gray and social historian Emma Dabiri, four modern confectioners uncover the mystery of what a sugarplum is before decorating a series of exquisite Twelfth Cakes, affordable only to Georgian's wealthy elite. As they move into the Victorian era, they encounter the gulf between rich and poor - from Queen Victoria's favoured Boar's Head cake to jelly pistols and sugar mice accessible to children with just a few pennies to spend(n)

programme.title: Talking Pictures
programme.desc: Sylvia Syms narrates a history of Westerns, featuring archive interviews with stars including Gary Cooper, James Stewart, Yul Brynner, Paul Newman, John Wayne and Clint Eastwood(n)

programme.title: Paint Your Wagon (1969)
programme.desc: A gold prospector buys a wife from a Mormon and agrees to share her with his mining partner when she insists they all live together. Mindful that her presence in an all-male town might give rise to jealousy, he hijacks a stagecoach carrying six working girls and opens a brothel in town. Oscar-nominated musical Western, starring Lee Marvin, Clint Eastwood, with Jean Seberg and Harve Presnell(n)

programme.title: Finding Neverland (2004)
programme.desc: Fact-based period drama based on the life of Peter Pan author JM Barrie. As a young-at-heart playwright, Barrie is uncomfortable with life in the critical spotlight. However, his friendship with four boys and their free-spirited widowed mother brings him the inspiration for his greatest work. Starring Johnny Depp, Kate Winslet, Dustin Hoffman, Julie Christie, Freddie Highmore and Kelly Macdonald(n)

programme.title: Porridge
programme.desc: Fletch discovers fellow inmates at Slade Prison are planning an escape over Christmas - and is so convinced the bid is doomed to fail that he takes refuge in the hospital so he cannot be blamed when the tunnel is found. Festive edition of the classic comedy from 1975, starring Ronnie Barker and Richard Beckinsale(n)

programme.title: Chris & Michaela - Under the Christmas Sky
programme.desc: Chris Packham and Michaela Strachan travel the world to visit areas famous for natural light displays in the sky, discovering the traditions of the local people and going in search of winter wildlife. Their journey takes them to the desert of Jordan, where they get a taste of nomadic Bedouin life, while scanning the skies for a rare planetary conjunction that could be the origin for the story of the Star of Bethlehem. Going to the opposite climatic extreme, they visit Norway's frozen wilderness to see the Northern Lights, snow-mobiling with a Sami family and discovering how eagles and reindeer thrive in icy conditions(n)

programme.title: Top Gear
programme.desc: Paddy McGuinness and Freddie Flintoff go on a jungle adventure in Borneo with the Gurkhas, in a pair of very rare but very cheap old cars. Back in the studio, Chris Harris gets behind the wheel of the world's most luxurious SUV, and the gang is joined by Bob Mortimer(n)

programme.title: Dragons' Den
programme.desc: An eco-friendly gift-wrap business gets a helping hand from Santa, and a sock entrepreneur embodies the holiday spirit with his buy-one-give-one business model. A pair of candle entrepreneurs also try to persuade the Dragons - Sara Davies, Touker Suleyman, Deborah Meaden, Tej Lalvani and Peter Jones - that their products can spark some serious profit. But while all the hopefuls dream of Dragon cash for Christmas, these investors don't give the gift of investment unless a business has real sparkle. Presented by Evan Davis(n)

programme.title: The Misadventures of Romesh Ranganathan
programme.desc: The comedian explores the Sahara desert, where temperatures rise to 50 degrees celsius. Guided by Bobo, a local of Berber descent who was born and grew up in the desert, Romesh Ranganathan discovers a place that is vast and inhospitable, impossibly bleak and beautiful(n)

programme.title: The Ranganation
programme.desc: Romesh Ranganathan presents the best bits of series one. Joined by celebrity guests, his mum, and focus group The Ranganation, the comedian takes a funny, topical look at modern Britain(n)

programme.title: Cunk & Other Humans on 2019
programme.desc: Philomena Cunk and other contributors take a look back at the major events of the past 12 months. Topics may include Brexit, Joker, Theresa May, Prince Andrew, climate change, Corbyn v Johnson, Trump and Game of Thrones(n)

programme.title: Mock the Week
programme.desc: Host Dara O Briain and regular panellist Hugh Dennis serve up their unique festive take in a Christmas special filled with seasonal material, out-takes, best bits and hitherto unseen moments(n)

programme.title: Starter for 10 (2006)
programme.desc: A working-class student struggling to fit in at a Bristol university in the 1980s applies his formidable general knowledge to get on the college's University Challenge team. An even bigger challenge presents itself as he tries to woo a team-mate. Comedy drama, starring James McAvoy, Alice Eve, Catherine Tate, Charles Dance and Lindsay Duncan, with Mark Gatiss as quizmaster Bamber Gascoigne(n)

programme.title: Christmas University Challenge
programme.desc: Jeremy Paxman asks the questions as two teams each made up of four distinguished graduates compete on behalf of their former universities in the final of the festive series of the academic quiz(n)

programme.title: Secrets of Skin
programme.desc: Wherever they live, skin is critical in allowing animals to sense the world around them. Even the toughest of animals, Crocodilians, have a surprisingly sensitive side when it comes to their specialised skin sensors they use to detect the tiniest of ripples in the water. Deadly Pit Vipers use heat sensors to ambush the small rodents they feed on. Ben Garrod puts them to the test with an experiment to see if they will strike a cold or warm ping-pong ball. He also uncovers how the leaf nosed bat puts its facial skin to good use as an acoustic lens to echolocate around its dense forest habitat(n)

programme.title: Top of the Pops: 1988
programme.desc: Pet Shop Boys and Enya feature among the top hits and videos from 1988, while Cliff Richard sings Mistletoe and Wine, that year's Christmas Number one. Introduced by Bruno Brookes, Gary Davies and Anthea Turner(n)

programme.title: Top of the Pops: 1988
programme.desc: Steve Wright and Nicky Campbell present the edition first broadcast on December 22, featuring the Four Tops, a-ha, Kim Wilde, Shakin' Stevens, Freiheit, Neneh Cherry, Kylie Minogue and Jason Donovan, Cliff Richard and Status Quo(n)

programme.title: Country Music by Ken Burns
programme.desc: The history of the American art form from the mid-1980s to mid-1990s, an era that saw the success of 'New Traditionalists' such as Reba McEntire, George Strait and Dwight Yoakam. Garth Brooks exploded onto the scene to recalibrate the yardstick of success, while after being dropped from his label, an aging Johnny Cash, at the invitation of a hip-hop producer, returned to the studio with just his guitar and his unforgettable voice to record a series of albums that sold millions of copies and earned him the respect of the industry he helped to create. Contributors include Ricky Skaggs, Vince Gill, Willie Nelson, Rosanne Cash, Merle Haggard and Garth Brooks. Narrated by Peter Coyote(n)

programme.title: Country Christmas
programme.desc: Trisha Yearwood hosts and performs during this 10th annual Country Music Association's Christmas special. The event features festive classics, including one-of-a-kind collaborations by artists Lady Antebellum, Rascal Flatts, Runaway June, CeCe Winans, Brett Young and Chris Young. Plus, performances by Kristin Chenoweth, Chris Janson and Tori Kelly(n)

programme.title: Flat Pack Pop: Sweden's Music Miracle
programme.desc: James Ballardie charts Sweden's rise as a musical superpower, exploring the unique songwriting formula that inspired some of the biggest hits of the last 30 years. What started out as an experiment on the Stockholm underground club scene in the 1990s blossomed into a genre of its own, spearheaded by the likes of music producer and songwriter Denniz Pop. These unlikely heroes of bubblegum pop launched the careers of Britney Spears, the Backstreet Boys, Westlife and others. Featuring interviews with producers and artists, including Katy Perry, Justin Timberlake, Ace of Base and Robyn(n)

programme.title: Peaky Blinders
programme.desc: Tommy receives a mysterious letter on Christmas Eve 1925 and realises that the Shelbys are in danger of annihilation, despite his new-found and unprecedented legitimacy. As the enemy closes in, Tommy flees his country house and returns to the only safe place he knows - Small Heath, Birmingham, where the family must find a way to put differences aside, take up arms and fight for survival(n)

programme.title: Peaky Blinders
programme.desc: As the Shelbys come to terms with the shocking events of Christmas Day, Tommy tries to unite his family and makes a decision he may come to regret, enlisting the help of tough Romany Gypsy Aberama Gold, who wants something unusual in return. Jessie Eden confronts Tommy about the workers' pay, warning him that revolution is in the air. As the situation plays out, Tommy's factory manager tells him he has one more meeting, with a mysterious businessman from Paris, but what transpires is no ordinary meeting, with no ordinary businessman(n)

programme.title: Peaky Blinders
programme.desc: The Italians launch another attack on the Peaky Blinders and Tommy realises that the Shelbys need to evolve if they are to survive, but some of the family are reluctant to part with tradition. As the strike takes hold at the Lanchester factory, Tommy pays a personal visit to Jessie Eden, but is outmanoeuvred when she reveals something she knows about his past, while Changretta plans further ways to continue the vendetta in the most devastating way possible. Elsewhere, Luca makes direct contact with someone at the heart of the Peaky Blinders organisation(n)

programme.title: Nothing Like a Dame
programme.desc: Eileen Atkins, Judi Dench, Joan Plowright and Maggie Smith let the cameras in on a friendship that goes back more than half a century. Coming together for a weekend at the country retreat Dame Joan once shared with her husband Laurence Olivier, the acting greats discuss their lives and careers, reminisce about their humble beginnings in the theatre, and reflect on love and loss(n)

programme.title: As Time Goes By
programme.desc: Special edition featuring clips from past episodes. With Alistair and Judith now married, and Sandy and Harry in Canada, Lionel and Jean reminisce on their own(n)

programme.title: Mrs Brown (1997)
programme.desc: Queen Victoria is helped by a no-nonsense Scottish manservant to overcome her long period of mourning for the death of her husband. However, it is not long before their subsequent friendship is frowned upon by members of the court. John Madden's period drama, starring Judi Dench, Billy Connolly, Geoffrey Palmer, Antony Sher and Gerard Butler(n)

programme.title: Philomena (2013)
programme.desc: A teenager in 1950s Ireland becomes pregnant, and is sent to a home for 'fallen women', while her baby is forcibly taken from her and sent to America to be adopted. Fifty years later, she meets a disillusioned political journalist who attempts to reunite her with her son. Fact-based drama, starring Judi Dench and Steve Coogan(n)

programme.title: Peaky Blinders
programme.desc: The Shelbys are lured by the Italians into a cat-and-mouse chase on the street of Birmingham, where it becomes clear that Tommy has met his match. Tommy tries to console himself with a visit from an old flame, but it soon becomes clear that he cannot always get what he wants. As his factory lies idle, Tommy confronts the possibility that the Communists might win and he'll be deemed a traitor to his class. Meanwhile, Changretta prepares to spring another trap. Period gangster drama, starring Cillian Murphy(n)

programme.title: Peaky Blinders
programme.desc: Tommy finds himself engaged in bloody battle with Luca Changretta and his gang. The family gather to find out what happened, but Lizzie has even greater news to break. Meanwhile, an army colonel has questions for Ada about her past as a Communist, and Jessie Eden confirms just how far she is prepared to go in pursuit of her cause. Sensing an opportunity to capitalise on his situation, Luca Changretta makes his way to London to present a plan to Alfie Solomons. Starring Cillian Murphy, Helen McCrory and Adrien Brody(n)

programme.title: Peaky Blinders
programme.desc: The night of the big fight arrives, and as the bell rings and the crowd goes wild, dangers lurk in the shadows for Tommy Shelby and his family, and Tommy soon discovers who he can truly trust. Meanwhile, as Changretta plays his final ace, he sets in motion a series of events that will change the Peaky Blinders forever. Starring Cillian Murphy, Adrien Brody, Tom Hardy, Helen McCrory, Charlie Murphy, Sophie Rundle, Paul Anderson, Kate Phillips, Ned Dennehy and Jack Rowan(n)

programme.title: Mrs Dickens' Family Christmas
programme.desc: Sue Perkins explores Charles Dickens' marriage through the eyes of his wife, Catherine - and exposes the reality of their festive family holiday, which was much different to the heart-warming versions he wrote about in A Christmas Carol. Focusing on the woman behind the man, Sue reveals parallels between the female characters he created and in his changing affections for his other half, explores the realities of Victorian marriage and follows Catherine's recipe for a Twelfth Night cake(n)

programme.title: Some Mothers Do 'Ave 'Em
programme.desc: Betty agrees to look after two children for the day. However, Frank's attempts at keeping the youngsters occupied soon get him into difficulties, thanks to a mischievous monkey and a pair of roller skates. Classic comedy, starring Michael Crawford and Michele Dotrice(n)

programme.title: The Good Life
programme.desc: Margo returns her entire Christmas order because the tree is too short - and she and Jerry are left with no means to celebrate after the department store fails to redeliver in time. Tom and Barbara come to the rescue, inviting them round for a Christmas of homemade paper hats and improvised party games. Seasonal special from 1977, starring Richard Briers, Penelope Keith, Paul Eddington and Felicity Kendal(n)

programme.title: All About The Good Life
programme.desc: In !975 a new sitcom introduced viewers to the self-sufficient world of Tom and Barbara Good, who had a smallholding in their suburban back garden, much to the horror of the upwardly mobile Leadbetters next door. This documentary reveals all about the show created by Bob Larbey and John Esmonde, from the perils of filming knee-deep in mud to the ultimate accolade of performing live in front of the Queen at Television Centre. Contributors include stars Richard Briers and Penelope Keith, as well as Monty Don, Brian Sewell and John O'Farrell(n)

programme.title: The 12 Drinks of Christmas
