programme.title: Agatha Christie's Marple
programme.desc: The sleuth helps an old friend find refuge at country house Greenshaw's Folly, but a sinister shadow falls over the strange building's various inhabitants and a murderer strikes. Miss Marple uncovers secrets from the past about Miss Greenshaw as a dangerous storm gathers and the bodies start to pile up. Julia McKenzie heads an all-star cast that includes Jim Moir (better known as Vic Reeves), Kimberley Nixon, Fiona Shaw, Robert Glenister, Julia Sawalha, Judy Parfitt and Matt Willis (formerly of pop group Busted)(n)

programme.title: Heartbeat
programme.desc: An accidental shooting at Ashfordly Hall prompts Bellamy to investigate reports accusing acting estate manager Richard Bentham of exploiting youngsters for child labour, but his enquiries reveal a far more complicated situation. Peggy discovers a promising new source of revenue when she realises there is a market for guided tours of the area, but her excitement is cut short by a terrifying encounter. Rural drama, guest starring former Emmerdale actor Peter Amory, with Mark Jordon, Rupert Vansittart and Gwen Taylor(n)

programme.title: Agatha Christie's Poirot
programme.desc: The Belgian sleuth is asked to vet potential suitors vying for the hand of an Australian heiress and discreetly accompanies her on a rail journey aboard the Plymouth Express, only to find himself investigating a jewel theft. Mystery, with David Suchet and Julian Wadham(n)

programme.title: Vera
programme.desc: The detective is called in when David Kenworthy, the son of a prominent local family, is found murdered on the beach at Whitley Bay. A witness spotted arcade owner Larry Crowe arguing with David on the night of the killing, and a search of the suspect's property uncovers a bloodied baseball bat. However, Larry has a cast-iron alibi and it's clear he wasn't the only person the victim met that night. A second death then leaves Vera facing mounting pressure to crack the case, and struggling to answer the question of why David was drawn to the seafront on the evening of his father's retirement. Brenda Blethyn stars in the murder mystery, with David Leon as her trusty sidekick Joe(n)

programme.title: Vera
programme.desc: The body of a man killed by a single gunshot wound is discovered on the moors and a burnt-out truck containing the remains of a deer is found a mile away. Joe is convinced the case is a poaching war gone wrong, but for Vera, the truth is never that straightforward. Delving into the victim's story, she unearths a sad childhood in the country and a troubled life in the city, scraping by as a novelist. Following the recent death of his grandfather, he returned to Northumberland after a 15-year absence to sell his inheritance to a wealthy couple - but pulled out of the deal at the last minute. Could his death be linked to a dispute over land? Brenda Blethyn and David Leon star in the murder mystery(n)

programme.title: A Touch of Frost
programme.desc: A casino is robbed, presenting Frost with a fresh challenge to his deductive powers, and things go from bad to worse when a local copper is reported missing and a well-known armed thug is spotted in Denton. David Jason stars, with Bruce Alexander and George Anton(n)

programme.title: A Touch of Frost
programme.desc: Downtrodden detective Jack Frost investigates after an unidentified man's body is found on top of a pile of glass at a council recycling centre - and the subsequent autopsy reveals a few surprises. Another case is soon on the cards when an apparent suicide raises suspicions. On the personal front, Frost decides to get in shape and joins a gym, where he falls for the charms of his fitness trainer. Starring David Jason and Claire Cox(n)

programme.title: Wild at Heart
programme.desc: Du Plessis is hailed as South Africa's answer to Crocodile Dundee as guests arrive at Leopard's Den to watch him in action. However, publicity is the last thing the family wants when pet cheetah Jana runs away from a stunt and has an accident. Meanwhile, a man claiming ownership of a lion demands Danny hand it over - or he will report Jana's injuries to the authorities. Deon Stewardson and Stephen Tompkinson star(n)

programme.title: Wild at Heart
programme.desc: The residents visit an auction to buy a giraffe after their own is killed by lions, but when Danny and Alice argue over a suitable replacement, he is led into the arms of Vanessa. Meanwhile, an approaching storm means the family has to release some of the animals for safety reasons - but when it hits, Charlotte and Danny come off worst. Stephen Tompkinson, Dawn Steele and Mary-Anne Barlow star(n)

programme.title: Rising Damp
programme.desc: Rigsby jumps to the conclusion that Philip has bought him the kind of curvaceous Christmas cracker every man dreams of, but, as usual, his happiness is short-lived. Vintage 1975 seasonal special, starring Leonard Rossiter, Don Warrington, Richard Beckinsale and Gay Rose(n)

programme.title: Agatha Christie's Poirot
programme.desc: The sleuth is called in to investigate when the UK's prime minister and his secretary are kidnapped in France. However, he has only a day and a half to solve the case before an important conference is set to take place. Drama, starring David Suchet(n)

programme.title: Agatha Christie's Poirot
programme.desc: A Belgian film star arrives in London and summons her friend Poirot to unravel the mysterious threats she has been receiving, which demand the return of a priceless diamond, the Western Star. Rosalind Bennett guest stars(n)

programme.title: Inspector Morse
programme.desc: The Oxford detective investigates a murder in the vicinity of a quiet country church, whose previous vicar committed suicide. As the case proceeds, he uncovers a sinister nest of evil-doing. John Thaw and Kevin Whately star, with Michael Hordern, Angela Morant and Maurice O'Connell(n)

programme.title: Inspector Morse
programme.desc: An American tourist's body is discovered in her hotel room, apparently dead from a heart attack - but a valuable Anglo-Saxon jewel she intended to donate to the Ashmolean Museum is missing and several interested parties are acting strangely. John Thaw and Kevin Whately star, with Simon Callow, Roberta Taylor and Kenneth Cranham(n)

programme.title: Agatha Christie's Marple
programme.desc: The glamorous Ruth Van Rydock contacts her old friend Jane Marple with a mystery - her sister Carrie Louise's study has been devastated by a suspicious fire. While Carrie Louise has the same cheerful outlook as ever, Ruth fears dark forces are at play at Stonygates, the home Carrie shares with her third husband, various relatives and a motley crew of young criminals, the latest subject of Carrie's philanthropic endeavours. But on the evening before a theatrical show is staged for their guests, one of whom is Miss Marple, an even more fascinating performance takes place before their very eyes - one where the final act is murder. Julia McKenzie stars, with guest appearances from Joan Collins, Penelope Wilton, Brian Cox, Maxine Peake, Alexei Sayle, Sarah Smart, Ian Ogilvy, Sean Hughes and Nigel Terry(n)

programme.title: Agatha Christie's Marple
programme.desc: Hollywood actress Marina Gregg and her director husband take up residence at Gossington Hall in the village of St Mary Mead and hold a reception to meet their new neighbours, including the hall's previous owner Dolly Bantry. The celebrations turn to tragedy, however, after a fan fatally drinks a poisoned cocktail apparently meant for the new lady of the manor. But a different picture begins to emerge as Marina spits out a similarly spiked cup of coffee on the set of her new film - and Miss Marple investigates the star's unhappy past. Julia McKenzie stars, with Lindsay Duncan, Nigel Harman, Joanna Lumley, Martin Jarvis, Hugh Bonneville and Michele Dotrice(n)

programme.title: Agatha Christie's Poirot
programme.desc: The dapper Belgian sleuth receives several anonymous letters outlining a killer's intention to murder a succession of people in alphabetical order, prompting him to try to unmask the culprit before the body-count mounts. Crime drama based on the Agatha Christie novel, starring David Suchet, with Pippa Guard, Donald Sumpter and Miranda Forbes(n)

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: At a Christmas family get-together, a cracker riddle states two people will die before midnight on Boxing Day, and just a few hours later family matriarch Lydia meets an untimely end - giving Barnaby the perfect reason to escape a boring Christmas with his in-laws. John Nettles and John Hopkins star, with guest appearances by Haydn Gwynne and Margery Mason(n)

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: It's a time of joy and happiness in Midsomer for once - Christmas is coming, and DCI Barnaby and his wife Sarah are soon to become parents. But the festive mood changes when a man is stabbed to death with an antique sword during a ghost-hunting party at a spooky manor house in Morton Shallows. Is blacksmith's daughter Rose Wilton seeking revenge from beyond the grave, or will Barnaby and sidekick Charlie Nelson find a more earthly motive behind the murder? Starring Neil Dudgeon and Gwilym Lee, with Fiona Dolman, Les Dennis, Elizabeth Berrington, Mark Heap, Emily Joyce, James Murray and Hannah Tointon(n)

programme.title: Hattie
programme.desc: Ruth Jones stars as Carry On actress Hattie Jacques in this dramatisation of her secret affair with a younger man in the early 1960s, while still married to actor John Le Mesurier. A love triangle develops between the three and Hattie uses her charm and ingenuity to control escalating family tensions and threats of public exposure - but must ultimately make a decision that puts her at risk of being left on her own. Also starring Robert Bathurst, Aidan Turner and Jeany Spark(n)

programme.desc: Jack finds himself working alongside DS Lawson on a delicate case involving a spate of attacks on defenceless senior citizens in their homes, while Lawson also offers him some advice on his personal life. David Jason stars, with Bruce Alexander, Sally Dexter and Neil Phillips(n)

programme.title: Agatha Christie's Marple
programme.desc: Lady Virginia Revel receives a marriage proposal from an ambitious politician, but is reluctant to accept it, especially as she is also being courted by a dashing young suitor. Accompanied by Miss Marple, she travels to a weekend party at her family home Chimneys, hoping to reach a decision. Negotiations for the sale of the country house are taking place during the gathering, but when new owner Count Ludwig of Austria is found murdered, St Mary Mead's elderly spinster must identify the culprit. Whodunit, starring Julia McKenzie, with a supporting cast including Gavin & Stacey stars Ruth Jones and Mathew Horne, plus Dervla Kirwan, Charlotte Salt, Michelle Collins, Jonas Armstrong and Edward Fox(n)

But tensions between the couple mount when the prince invites house guests to join the celebrations. Meanwhile, Skerrett inherits a large estate from an estranged uncle. programme.desc: Nicky and Steve discover that their kitchen has flooded and call upon her dad, Ken, for help. programme.desc: Steve's dreams of peaceful country nights are shattered when Grizzo and his band begin rehearsing for the new album outdoors. Noise isn't the only thing keeping him awake though, as his web-design business is quickly losing customers to a rival firm. All the while, Matt and Meena's new venture is only increasing in strength, and Steve is not impressed when the pair seek some free advice on taking their business online. Plus, if the situation was not bad enough, Nicky manages to saddle him with a work-experience boy from the village - who turns out to be none other than the dreaded Bronson. Comedy drama, starring Jack Dee and Kerry Godliman(n)

programme.title: Bad Move
programme.desc: The couple are alarmed to discover that an ancient public right of way runs straight through their garden and a tense stand-off ensues when Steve makes enemies of the ramblers who insist on using it. Meanwhile, Matt and Meena have organised for their children to take part in a sponsored recorder-playing session for the local hospital and are adamant that Nicky and Steve should come along to support it. Comedy, starring Jack Dee and Kerry Godliman(n)

programme.title: The Americans
programme.desc: An arms-control summit is on the horizon and Elizabeth is pushed to the limit, while Philip receives a visitor who makes an alarming request. Return of the Cold War thriller, starring Keri Russell and Matthew Rhys(n)

programme.desc: Text-based information service(n)

programme.title: Columbo: Death Hits the Jackpot (1991)
programme.desc: A photographer going through a divorce asks his jeweller uncle to cash in his winning lottery ticket to prevent his wife from getting a share. Seizing the opportunity to keep the money, the greedy older man kills his nephew - but has reckoned without Columbo's intervention. Detective drama, starring Peter Falk, Rip Torn, Gary Kroeger and Jamie Rose(n)

programme.title: Football's Greatest: Johan Cruyff
programme.desc: A profile of the former football player and manager, who played and managed Ajax and Barcelona, and represented the Netherlands on 48 occasions, scoring 33 goals(n)

programme.title: Fifth Gear
programme.desc: Tiff Needell visits northern Sweden for a very chilly rally challenge to learn the skills of racing on sheet ice. Jonny Smith journeys to Iceland to drive Land Rover's Discovery Sport, while Vicki Butler-Henderson takes two sleek sport cars to the track, Audi's TT and Peugeot's highly rated RCZ-R, to find out which is the faster. Volvo predicts that by 2020 no one will ever be killed or seriously injured in one of their car, which prompts Jonny to watch them crash their new flagship model, the XC90. Plus, the team tests the very distinctive looking Lexus NX(n)

programme.title: Columbo: Sex and the Married Detective (1989)
programme.desc: A sex therapist tries to pin the blame for the murder of her unfaithful lover on her assistant, but the dishevelled detective is not convinced by the ruse and seeks to identify a mysterious woman in black who was spotted leaving the scene of the crime. Detective drama, starring Peter Falk, Lindsay Crouse, Peter Jurasik and Julia Montgomery(n)

The pair arrive in Amman and explore the city's ancient citadel, before attempting to secure a biblical selection box of gold, frankincense and myrrh, starting with a visit to the gold souk. They also go for a dip in the Dead Sea, follow in the footsteps of Moses as they scale Mount Nebo, and head for the ancient city of Petra, before ending their trip back in Amman, where they learn how to prepare a Jordanian Festive Feast(n)

programme.title: Secrets of the Factories
programme.desc: In factories across the nation, manufacturers are hard at work ensuring that Brits everywhere have all the trimmings they need for a comforting classic Christmas. This documentary takes a look at how staples of the festive season actually get made, such as Christmas trees, Christmas crackers, tinsel, Christmas jumpers and Christmas puddings. Plus, a look at some food items, such as the 10,000 tonnes of sprouts grown and harvested in Lincolnshire and how enough figgy puddings are made in a single week to fill the seats of Tottenham Hotspur Stadium(n)

programme.title: Cruising with Jane McDonald
programme.desc: In her final adventure in the current series, the singer takes to the Adriatic Sea. Starting in the popular and historic city of Dubrovnik, Croatia, Jane escapes the hordes of tourists on a four-wheel-drive tour in the picturesque hills of the city. Boarding the luxury ship, Jane's tour continues to Venice, where she meets gifted glass-makers on the island of Murano. The cruise then continues to the Roman city of Split in Croatia, before she ends her Adriatic adventure besides the mountains of Montenegro on the Bay of Kotor(n)

programme.title: Sandringham: The Royals at Christmas

Run with military precision and steeped in tradition, the film examines what Prince Harry's then-fiancee Meghan Markle has in store as she attends for the first time and the etiquette to which she must adhere. Plus, a look at the rich history of the royal family Christmas, going back to Victorian times. Contributors include royal insiders and cultural historians(n)

programme.title: Inside

programme.title: Agatha & The Truth of Murder
programme.desc: On January 12, 1920, Florence Nightingale Shore - a nurse and god-daughter of Florence Nightingale - is found brutally beaten on a train, dying four days later due to the extent of her injuries. Driven to distraction by the lack of progress and the failure of the police to catch the killer, Florence's longtime friend Mabel Rogers begins her own investigation and makes an appeal to Agatha Christie for help. Moved by the plea and eager for the chance to escape from professional and personal problems, the writer agrees to try to solve the case. Mystery, starring Ruth Bradley, Pippa Haywood and Tim McInnerny(n)

A cast of famous faces guide viewers through the results, giving their take on some of the most enduring songs ever written. programme.title: Freddie Mercury: A Christmas Story
programme.desc: Aside from being the only act in musical history to land the same UK Christmas number one twice, Queen's affinity with the yuletide season ran deeper than just commercial success. With Bohemian Rhapsody halfway through its nine-week run atop the charts in December 1975, Queen chose Christmas Eve to play a televised tour de force from London's Hammersmith Odeon. Freddie Mercury had a deep-rooted love for everything Christmas, with a lifelong generosity of spirit. In this documentary, friends and loved ones reflect on the band, alongside many of Queen's best-loved hits and rare footage of Mercury with some of his closest confidantes(n)

programme.title: Queen: A Night at the Odeon

The agent reveals she is working undercover for DEA in an attempt to break the ring via her connection to the lead cocaine producer, Marion Watkins, who just happens to be her childhood friend. programme.title: Ben and Holly's Little Kingdom

programme.title: Olly the Little White Van
programme.desc: Christmas Eve arrives, and Bazza looks forward to receiving a big present. However, when he finds out he has been placed on Santa's 'naughty list', he tries to change his ways(n)

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.desc: Muck helps out with a Christmas display at the plaza, but ends up accidentally knocking down the giant gingerbread house that the team are building(n)

programme.title: Fireman Sam
programme.desc: The Joneses and the Prices both try to win the competition for the best Christmas lights in Pontypandy, but things do not go to plan when the time comes to switch their displays on(n)

programme.title: Thomas & Friends
programme.desc: Thomas is desperate to impress his friends by finding an amazing discovery, and it is not long before his wish is granted(n)

programme.title: Shane the Chef
programme.desc: Milly the goat eats the flowers that Sid plans to give Penny, so Shane finds a fresh way for Sid to express his feelings by creating a bouquet made from Maggie's vegetables(n)

programme.title: Ben and Holly's Little Kingdom
programme.desc: The elf plane is forced to make an emergency landing en route to delivering the last batch of Christmas presents(n)

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: George and Peppa have lots of fun playing in the snow, making footprints, rolling snowballs and building a snowman(n)

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Peppa and George go to the park to play on a cold winter's day(n)

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: The pig and her friends are taught to ski by Madame Gazelle, who was once a world champion(n)

programme.title: Paw Patrol
programme.desc: The pier starts to collapse during an art show. The pups get people to safety, but Francois refuses to leave his sculpture behind(n)

programme.title: Nella the Princess Knight
programme.desc: When ice dragons steal Santa's sack of presents on Christmas Eve, Nella and her friends set out on a quest to get them back in time for Christmas(n)

programme.title: Pirata & Capitano
programme.desc: The pirates lose a game, and as a forfeit, they are challenged to steal bananas from an ogre(n)

programme.title: Floogals
programme.desc: Girl Hooman has a wobbly tooth, which is odd in itself, but then she puts it under her pillow when it falls out. The Floogals set out to discover why(n)

programme.title: Shimmer and Shine
programme.desc: The girls help Layla, the Ice Genie, create fun snow decorations for the upcoming Frosty Fun Festival(n)

programme.title: Digby Dragon
programme.desc: After being rescued from the snow, Grizel is keen to help the friends with the preparations for the Christmas festival and feast - with disastrous results(n)

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: SpongeBob and Patrick become trapped in an alternative dimension in which anything they draw comes to life(n)

programme.title: Rise of the Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles
programme.desc: The heroes needs to look after Splinter when he comes down with the dreaded rat flu(n)

programme.title: Cruising with Jane McDonald
programme.desc: Highlights of Jane's cruise from Miami, around the Caribbean to Puerto Rico(n)

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: Phoebe holds a job interview coaching session for a nervous Chandler, and Ross unwittingly makes Rachel jealous by flirting with a sales assistant. Monica is stung by a restaurant reviewer's comments and joins his cookery class to persuade him to reconsider his opinion(n)

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: Phoebe and Monica have fun placing bets on when Rachel's overdue baby will arrive, while Chandler accompanies Joey to the premiere of his new film - and promptly falls asleep(n)

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: Part one of two. As Rachel's labour begins and expectant father Ross paces the corridors, the rest of the gang finds the hospital the perfect place for romance. Phoebe courts a handsome patient, while Monica and Chandler decide there is no time like the present to start a family of their own(n)

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: Part two of two. Rachel finally gives birth after enduring 21 hours in labour - but Phoebe cannot understand why Ross and the new mother are apart. Meanwhile, Joey finds Ross's engagement ring and accidently proposes to the vulnerable new mother(n)

programme.title: Father of the Bride (1991)
programme.desc: A doting dad is taken aback when his daughter announces she is getting married, and is thrown into a whirlwind of increasingly complicated wedding plans, a struggle to live up to the expectations of his wealthy future in-laws and the sad realisation that his little girl has grown up. Remake of the 1950s comedy, with Steve Martin, Diane Keaton, Kimberly Williams and Martin Short(n)

programme.title: Access
programme.desc: Showbiz news and gossip(n)

programme.title: Father of the Bride (1991)
programme.desc: A doting dad is taken aback when his daughter announces she is getting married, and is thrown into a whirlwind of increasingly complicated wedding plans, a struggle to live up to the expectations of his wealthy future in-laws and the sad realisation that his little girl has grown up. Remake of the 1950s comedy, with Steve Martin, Diane Keaton, Kimberly Williams and Martin Short(n)

programme.title: Sister Act (1992)
programme.desc: Nightclub singer Deloris Van Cartier agrees to testify against her gangster boyfriend after witnessing a murder. Placed in protective custody by the authorities, she is less than pleased to discover she is expected to pose as chaste nun Sister Mary Clarence in a convent. Comedy, starring Whoopi Goldberg, Harvey Keitel, Maggie Smith, Bill Nunn and Kathy Najimy(n)

programme.title: Access
programme.desc: Showbiz news and gossip(n)

programme.title: Sister Act (1992)
programme.desc: Nightclub singer Deloris Van Cartier agrees to testify against her gangster boyfriend after witnessing a murder. Placed in protective custody by the authorities, she is less than pleased to discover she is expected to pose as chaste nun Sister Mary Clarence in a convent. Comedy, starring Whoopi Goldberg, Harvey Keitel, Maggie Smith, Bill Nunn and Kathy Najimy(n)

programme.title: 5 News Weekend
programme.desc: Round-up of the day's headlines from around the world(n)

programme.title: Celebrity Carols at Christmas
programme.desc: Aled Jones, Rev Richard Coles and Josie D'Arby present a celebration of festive music, a feast of favourite carols sung by popular choirs from across the north of England performing at Cutlers' Hall and Sheffield Cathedral. Aled will be performing alongside some of the groups featured, which include the Military Wives Choir, Only Men Aloud and Chorus UK, as well as children from Lindley Infant School in Huddersfield and a traditional Victorian carollers' choir(n)

programme.title: Building the Ice Hotel
programme.desc: Documentary following the progress of artistic director Ake Larson and architect Arne Bergh as they embark on a six-week project to build Icehotel, a sophisticated structure constructed in the Swedish village of Jukkasjarvi - more than 120 miles inside the Arctic Circle. The venue has been built from snow and ice every year since 1990, when an edifice housing an exhibition of ice sculptures became a temporary hostel for visiting art enthusiasts. However, an unseasonable heatwave in the middle of the build leaves the team struggling to complete the construction in time to accommodate paying guests(n)

programme.title: Gregg Wallace's Magical Christmas Market
programme.desc: The MasterChef presenter embarks on a festive adventure around Europe to learn how the humble market stall has become such a key staple of Christmas, both in Britain and around the world. In Vienna he finds out about the Christmas market's origins and the ingredients that make them such special places, from mulled wine to hand-made decorations. He also reveals how the UK's Christmas traditions travelled from this part of Europe, with the help of Queen Victoria's husband Prince Albert(n)

programme.title: Totally Stuffed! Secrets of the Mega Christmas Buffet
programme.desc: In August, Channel 5 broadcast a documentary about the JRC Global Buffet, which can serve as many as 3,000 people every day. Now cameras visit the Wembley branch to see how staff cope at the busiest time of the year. Christmas dinner with all the trimmings is on the menu in December, meaning the chefs cook an amazing 3,000kg of turkey as well as thousands of sausages and sprouts. But they also serve up festive variations on their traditional Asian treats too, going all out to make the experience as fun as possible for their customers(n)

programme.title: Greatest Ever Christmas Movies
programme.desc: Countdown of the best festive films, from White Christmas and It's a Wonderful Life to Bad Santa and Elf. Gremlins star Zach Galligan and Miracle on 34th Street's Mara Wilson talk about their experiences making their movies, while Aled Jones reveals that he hadn't even seen classic animation The Snowman until nearly 20 years after having a hit in 1985 with a version of its famous song Walking in the Air. Featuring contributions by Ollie Locke, Stacey Solomon, Joe Swash and Eamonn Holmes(n)

programme.title: Angels Sing (2013)
programme.desc: A man is forced to reassess his attitude to Christmas after meeting a cheerful, white-bearded, truck-driving stranger. Family comedy, starring Harry Connick Jr, Connie Britton, Willie Nelson and Chandler Canterbury(n)

programme.title: A Thousand Words (2012)
programme.desc: A spiritual guru decides to teach his lying literary agent a lesson for his dishonesty, and places a curse on him. The spell means he can only speak another 1,000 words in his life - and when the words run out, he will die. The only way to break the enchantment is to put right all his past mistakes. Comedy, starring Eddie Murphy and Kerry Washington(n)

programme.title: Rio 2 (2014)
programme.desc: Parrots Jewel and Blu lead a happy life together in Rio with their three chicks, until they find themselves hurled into an expedition up the Amazon. The journey leads to an encounter with an old enemy, while Blu also has to win the approval of Jewel's fearsome father. Animated comedy sequel, with the voices of Jesse Eisenberg, Anne Hathaway and Jamie Foxx(n)

programme.title: The Rewrite (2014)
programme.desc: A washed-up Hollywood screenwriter takes a job at a small university, planning to exploit his position as a local celebrity and do as little work as possible. His cynical outlook begins to change when he falls for a single mother working toward her degree, while a talented pupil makes him consider what he wants from his life. Romantic comedy, with Hugh Grant, Marisa Tomei, Allison Janney and JK Simmons(n)

programme.title: X-Men (2000)
programme.desc: Super-powered outsiders Rogue and Wolverine find themselves at a school for mutants which is run by a benevolent psychic professor. While there, they agree to join others with similar gifts to take on a superhuman mutant terrorist faction intent on establishing dominance over mankind. Sci-fi comic-book adventure, starring Hugh Jackman, Patrick Stewart, Ian McKellen, Anna Paquin and Halle Berry(n)

programme.title: Valerian and the City of a Thousand Planets (2017)
programme.desc: When a dark force threatens a vast metropolis, special operatives Valerian and Laureline must race to identify the menace and protect the future of the universe. Luc Besson's epic sci-fi adventure, starring Dane DeHaan, Cara Delevingne and Clive Owen(n)

programme.title: Jackass Presents: Bad Grandpa (2013)
programme.desc: A debauched old man makes a bizarre road trip across America to reunite his eight-year-old grandson with his real father. He takes the youngster through funerals, beauty pageants and biker bars and treats the people he meets to a display of his twisted approach to childcare. Hidden camera comedy, starring Johnny Knoxville and Jackson Nicoll(n)

programme.title: Everybody Wants Some!! (2016)
programme.desc: College baseball players enjoy a raucous weekend while preparing to start university in 1980. Richard Linklater's comedy, starring Blake Jenner and Juston Street(n)

programme.title: Stuart Little 2 (2002)
programme.desc: The plucky talking mouse feels left out when the son of his adopted human family makes a new pal - but quickly forgets such trifling matters when his high-flying canary friend is captured by an evil falcon, prompting the brave rodent to mount a daring rescue. Family adventure sequel, with Geena Davis, Hugh Laurie and Jonathan Lipnicki, and the voices of Michael J Fox, Melanie Griffith and James Woods(n)

programme.title: Horton Hears a Who! (2008)
programme.desc: A kindly elephant hears a cry of help coming from a speck of dust and discovers the minuscule city of Whoville. As he tries to help its citizens, the other animals begin to question his sanity, and the evil Kangaroo incites them to turn against the do-gooder. Animated adaptation of Dr Seuss's book, with the voices of Jim Carrey, Steve Carell, Carol Burnett, Seth Rogen and Will Arnett(n)

programme.title: Night at the Museum (2006)
programme.desc: A new nightwatchman at New York's Museum of Natural History discovers his job entails more than he bargained for. Once night falls, an ancient Egyptian spell brings the museum exhibits to life, entangling him in a riotous struggle to restore peace and order before the sun rises and visitors arrive. Fantasy comedy, starring Ben Stiller, Dick Van Dyke, Robin Williams, Carla Gugino and Ricky Gervais(n)

programme.title: Night at the Museum: Battle of the Smithsonian (2009)
programme.desc: The living exhibits at New York's Museum of Natural History are shipped to Washington's Smithsonian Institution - along with the artefact that brought them to life in the first place. Nightwatchman Larry tries to retrieve it, only to find the contents of the world's largest museum have been reanimated, including a pharaoh determined to take over the world. Fantasy comedy sequel, starring Ben Stiller, Amy Adams, Owen Wilson and Steve Coogan(n)

programme.title: The Devil Wears Prada (2006)
programme.desc: A woman with dreams of becoming a journalist takes a job as assistant to the editor of a prestigious fashion magazine - a position that should guarantee a bright future if she succeeds. Unfortunately, she has just signed up to work for the boss from hell, whose cruel personality and outrageous demands make her life a nightmare. Comedy drama, with Meryl Streep, Anne Hathaway, Stanley Tucci and Emily Blunt(n)

programme.title: Lucy (2014)
programme.desc: A courier is kidnapped and forced to become a drug mule. When she is exposed to the experimental chemicals she is smuggling, it boosts her intelligence and reflexes to superhuman levels. She uses her newfound abilities to get revenge on her captors, but as the process continues, she evolves into something more than human. Sci-fi thriller, starring Scarlett Johansson and Morgan Freeman(n)

programme.title: Area 51 (2015)
programme.desc: Four conspiracy theorists attempt to break into the US air force base in Nevada where they believe their government is hiding evidence of extraterrestrial life. Sci-fi thriller, starring Reid Warner, Darrin Bragg, Ben Rovner and Jelena Nik(n)

programme.title: Army of Darkness (1992)
programme.desc: Zombie-battling hero Ash is transported back in time to the medieval era. In an attempt to find a way back to his own time, he accidentally summons up a horde of living skeletons led by his own evil double and must fight to send them back to the grave. Comedy fantasy adventure sequel to Evil Dead II, starring Bruce Campbell and Embeth Davidtz(n)

programme.title: Killing Ground (2016)
programme.desc: Sam and Ian decide to spend the new year camping at a national park in the Outback, and find a beautiful, secluded spot, but notice another tent is already pitched there. They check it out and realise there must have been a violent disturbance and when they later discover a frightened toddler wandering alone in the woods it is not long before they find themselves thrust into a terrifying battle for survival. Australian horror, starring Harriet Dyer and Ian Meadows(n)

programme.title: Black Nativity (2013)
programme.desc: A teenager is sent from Baltimore to New York to spend Christmas with his aunt and uncle. He cannot cope with living by their strict rules and runs away, having a series of adventures as he strives to find his mother. Musical, starring Jacob Latimore, Forest Whitaker, Angela Bassett and Jennifer Hudson(n)

programme.title: Megamind (2010)
programme.desc: An evil genius finally succeeds in killing the superhero who has foiled his every evil scheme, but finds life without an enemy boring. To fill the gap, he transforms an ordinary man into a worthy adversary - but when his creation turns evil, it falls to the villain to save the world. Animated comedy, with the voices of Will Ferrell, Tina Fey and Brad Pitt(n)

programme.title: Dragonheart (1996)
programme.desc: A knight sets out to slay a dragon, only to find the unhappy creature is the last of its kind. Forging an unlikely alliance, the pair embark on a mission to rid their kingdom of its tyrannical ruler. Fantasy adventure, starring Dennis Quaid, David Thewlis, Pete Postlethwaite and Julie Christie, with the voice of Sean Connery(n)

programme.title: Nutty Professor II: The Klumps (2000)
programme.desc: Bumbling scientist Sherman Klump is engaged to be married and determined to rid himself of his troublesome alter ego Buddy Love for ever. All his problems look set to be solved by his fiancee's latest DNA experiment - but things are about to spiral out of control. Comedy sequel, starring Eddie Murphy in multiple roles, along with Janet Jackson and Larry Miller(n)

programme.title: Cowboys & Aliens (2011)
programme.desc: A Wild-West town dominated by a cattle baron comes under attack by invaders from another world. It falls to a mysterious stranger with no memory to unite the townsfolk, a gang of outlaws and an Apache tribe, in a bid to fight back against the aliens, and learn the truth about his own past. Sci-fi Western, with Daniel Craig, Harrison Ford, Olivia Wilde and Sam Rockwell(n)

programme.title: Miss Peregrine's Home for Peculiar Children (2016)
programme.desc: A boy investigates a series of clues left by his grandfather, and comes across a home for children with special powers, that has been concealed from the world using time travel. It falls to the boy to protect the home and its residents from a race of invisible monsters. Fantasy adventure based on the novel by Ransom Riggs, starring Eva Green, Asa Butterfield, Samuel L Jackson and Terence Stamp(n)

programme.title: 2 Guns (2013)
programme.desc: Two undercover agents - one working for the DEA the other for the Navy - infiltrate a drug cartel, only for the planned sting operation to go disastrously wrong. Both operatives become fugitives and must work together to survive - but both keep their true identity a secret, mistakenly thinking the other is a real criminal. Action adventure, starring Denzel Washington and Mark Wahlberg(n)

Comedy, guest starring Christine Baranski(n)

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine

Howard and Bernadette fall out over plans to renovate his childhood home. Wil Wheaton, Adam Nimoy and Stephen Merchant guest star(n)

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory

Bernadette experiences a big success at work and plans for Penny to become a part of it - whether she wants to or not(n)

programme.title: Star Trek (2009)

Sci-fi adventure based on the original TV series, starring Chris Pine, Zachary Quinto, Eric Bana, Zoe Saldana and Leonard Nimoy(n)

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: The fly-on-the-wall series turning the cameras on TV's most vocal armchair critics returns, as the show's regular gaggle of families, friends and viewing party acquaintances share their insightful, passionate and sometimes emotional critiques. They begin by casting their gaze at EastEnders, Britain's Got Talent: The Champions, Peaky Blinders, Expedition with Steve Backshall, Gordon Ramsay: Uncharted and First Dates Hotel(n)

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: The armchair critics turn their attention to shows including Peaky Blinders, The Cameron Interview, Jamie's Meat-Free Meals, The Great British Bake Off, Japan with Sue Perkins and World Chase Tag: 2019 World Championships. They also share their views on news coverage of a stolen toilet and Boris Johnson's visit to Luxembourg(n)

programme.title: First Dates
programme.desc: Singletons include political activist Lettie, who is 23 and looking for her intellectual equal, but despite being clued-up on politics, she is clueless on love. Meanwhile, octogenarian Doreen is not ready to give up on love and wants a man to keep her on her toes. Her date is 86-year-old author James(n)

programme.title: First Dates Abroad
programme.desc: Lingerie designer Jana is searching for a ‘big, bald guy' to carry her off into the sunset. Luckily, her date is bald-headed Englishman Chris, and the chemistry is soon crackling(n)

programme.title: Rude Tube
programme.desc: Alex Zane returns with the clip show's fifth Christmas compilation, providing viewers with another selection of 50 festive internet clips that have proved popular around the world. Among the hijinks captured on film are a turkey with a boob job and an inventive decoration-remover, plus a video that offers top tips on which gifts significant others will not appreciate finding under the tree on the big day(n)

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: Peralta is put in charge of Captain Holt's security after he receives several death threats - a responsibility he not only enjoys, but also abuses as much as he can. Santiago tries to encourage her colleagues to take a Christmas photo, only to be met with a lack of enthusiasm - and Diaz's refusal to smile. US cop comedy, starring Andy Samberg(n)

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: Peralta and Holt find the motivation to help Captain CJ with a big case that is proving problematic. Jeffords imposes a green initiative and tells Gina to remove her precious portable heater from the office. Diaz and Boyle take a break from the night shift to visit a foot massage parlour(n)

programme.title: Hollyoaks
programme.desc: Drama following the lives and loves of a group of teenagers and young adults in Chester(n)

programme.title: Rude(ish) Tube

programme.title: Father Christmas
programme.desc: Festive animation based on the book by Raymond Briggs, focusing on Santa's leisurely life on the other 364 days of the year, before he sets off for his annual gift-giving sleigh ride. With the voice of Mel Smith(n)

Sid the sloth accidentally ruins one of Manny the mammoth's Christmas traditions, and worries he may be on Santa Claus's naughty list - so he heads to the North Pole in a bid to redeem himself. Featuring the voices of John Leguizamo, Ray Romano, Queen Latifah and Denis Leary(n)

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Tension mounts when the pals attend a weekend science conference. Howard becomes argumentative after Bernadette runs into a former boyfriend, and the fallout causes chaos with the hotel room arrangements. Rick Fox guest stars, with Simon Helberg and Melissa Rauch(n)

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon agrees to participate in a series of short lectures at the university, but is worried the students dislike him. Following Amy's advice, he asks Penny to give him acting lessons to help him engage with his audience. Elsewhere, Raj fantasises about his best friend's partner. Comedy, starring Jim Parsons(n)

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Things don't run smoothly as Amy and Sheldon's cohabitation experiment continues, forcing Leonard and Penny to intervene when the couple have an argument about the 'bathroom schedule'. However, the pair are soon disturbed by unexpected guests dropping by(n)

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory

Leonard is upset when he finds out Penny has been moving his collectibles out of Sheldon's old room and into storage behind his back(n)

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon goes to great lengths to convince Amy that they should have a baby together after they successfully complete a scientific experiment using their DNA samples. Raj is too embarrassed to tell his friends what the new woman in his life does for a living(n)

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon cannot contain his jealousy when he hears that his university colleague Bert has won a prestigious fellowship with an impressive grant. programme.title: Young Sheldon

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory

With guest star Michael Trucco (Battlestar Galactica, One Tree Hill)(n)

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Leonard's mother visits and he is horrified to learn that Sheldon knows more than he does about his own family, including his parents' impending divorce and the death of his dog. Guest starring Christine Baranski(n)

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Leonard tries to get Sheldon into the Christmas mood by playing a game, but things do not go as planned when Sheldon reveals a childhood trauma. Raj goes out with the girls and reveals he had crushes on both Penny and Bernadette - but not Amy. Comedy, starring Johnny Galecki, Jim Parsons and Kaley Cuoco(n)

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon leaves for Texas when his sister goes into labour. While he is away, the rest of the friends decorate for Christmas and reflect on how much he has changed their lives. Comedy, starring Johnny Galecki, Jim Parsons and Kaley Cuoco(n)

programme.desc: Noel, Fielding, Sandi Toksvig, Prue Leith and Paul Hollywood welcome back eight past contestants to compete once more. programme.title: Come Dine with Me

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Charlotte Dawson hosts the second night of the dinner-party challenge despite never having cooked in her life, and serves up mushy pea soup followed by fish and chips(n)

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Internet prankster Stevo The Madman plans a Caribbean-themed Christmas dinner party, hoping to impress his rivals with authentic Caribbean cuisine and entertainment(n)

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Debbie McGee plans a black-tie event complete with a butler and silver service. She also shows off her dancing talents - although a few revelations from her past steal the show(n)

programme.title: Come Dine with Me

Charlotte Dawson is bamboozled by one of Dom's magic tricks, Stevo the Madman shows he's learned some manners over the week, Courtney Act eats food from the bin, and Debbie McGee gets down in the garden(n)

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Amy pulls out all the stops as she hosts a traditional Victorian Christmas Eve dinner for the friends. Comedy, starring Johnny Galecki, Jim Parsons and Kaley Cuoco(n)

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: After spending the holidays apart, the gang get together to hear about Sheldon's and Amy's trip to his mother's, Leonard and Penny recall their Christmas tree adventure, and Howard and Bernadette open up about their first days as parents(n)

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon and Howard plan respective birthday celebrations for Amy and Halley. A letter from his brother makes Leonard feel anxious about his own lack of accomplishments. The series takes a mid-season break until the new year.(n)

programme.title: Star Trek: Discovery
programme.desc: Face to face with Klingon vessels, USS Shenzhou prepares for the possibility of war if negotiations fail. Amid the turmoil, Burnham looks back to her Vulcan upbringing for guidance(n)

programme.title: Naked Attraction
programme.desc: Sales administrator Millie from Newquay says she has exhausted the local dating pool and is hoping to find herself the perfect partner. Sheffield window cleaner Alex was bullied in his teens for being overweight. He has trained hard to get a body he is proud of and now he is looking for someone who feels the same. Anna Richardson invites them both to choose a date from a selection of six naked people, whose bodies are revealed one section at a time(n)

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon, Amy, Leonard and Penny do their best to divide up all their possessions into two separate households, but tension ensues. Raj and Stuart compete to become indispensable to Howard and Bernadette as the baby's arrival looms. Christopher Lloyd (Back to the Future) guest stars(n)

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon and Amy's attempts to celebrate her birthday with an intimate night at home are interrupted by the news that Bernadette has gone into labour. However, it transpires that Howard, Raj and Stuart may have rushed the expectant mother to the hospital too early, with Raj having difficulty keeping the gender of the unborn child a secret(n)

programme.title: Food Unwrapped
programme.desc: Kate Quilton learns about a potentially life-saving property of discarded shrimp shells and Matt Tebbutt investigates why people cannot seem to get enough of salted caramel. Plus, Jimmy Doherty explores the price differences between fresh and frozen pizzas in supermarkets(n)

programme.desc: Alex and Jacqui MacPherson, from Eastbourne, East Sussex, plan to head to warmer climes to enjoy their retirement. programme.title: A Place in the Sun: Winter Sun
programme.desc: Having inherited some money, Hampshire couple Phil and Bernie Smith are now in a position of being able to afford a holiday home. They have decided that south Tenerife's warm winter climate is ideal for whenever Phil's work as a gardener in the UK slows down, so Scarlette Douglas shows them five apartments within their £100,000 budget for them to choose between(n)

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The first visit of the week is to the Borgue Hotel in Dumfries and Galloway, which owners Vince and Shirley Barrett run with military precision. On arrival, guests Adam and Naomi are not impressed with the decor, while Ken and Elaine do not like the orange towels. Later, over dinner, the hosts reveal who wears the trousers in their relationship, before Ken's jokes go down like a lead balloon(n)

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The owners visit the Allscott Mill B&B in Telford, Shropshire, on their second night, where hosts Ken and Elaine Purchase welcome their guests. On arrival, Shirely and Vince find fault with the lack of headroom in their lodgings, while Adam and Naomi are bemused by the absence of a toilet brush in their bathroom(n)

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The third visit of the week is to Park House in Llandrindod Wells, Powys, where owners Ian and Joan Barr hope their colourful B&B will impress their guests. Adam and Naomi are wowed by the vibrant decor, but Ken and Elaine take issue with a dirty toilet brush(n)

programme.title: Four in a Bed

They are pleased to discover it is Vince and Shirley's dream location, but Ken and Elaine don't share the same opinion. Later, the guests take part in an archery competition, and in the morning, are unimpressed with the DIY breakfast(n)

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The rival owners meet for the final time on the last day of the competition to find out what they've been paid and settle some scores. Hosting skills, breakfasts, facilities and two toilet brush gripes are aired before the cash is counted and the winner is announced(n)

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: NHS manager Helen Mather holds the first party in Leicester, hoping her plans for a simple menu will allow her more time to entertain her guests. However, the accident-prone host has a mishap involving raw pig's blood, and tries to turn the evening around with some 'urban ballet' after one diner sours the mood with a display of less-than-polite table manners(n)

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Estate agent Terry Robinson hosts the second dinner party in Leicester with a 'Dress as Your Hero' theme, and the Elton John fan also decides to treat his guests to a song. He is confident his menu will score him top marks, but while Richard is blown away, Ryan remains unimpressed(n)

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Beauty spa manager Porchia Lee hosts the third dinner party in Leicester, serving up a French-themed menu of chicken liver pate, pan-fried chicken with tarragon sauce and creme brulee. Unfortunately for her the pudding is so bad her guests are reduced to tears, and double glazing salesman Richard Deeping insults her appearance(n)

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: IT enthusiast Ryan Bruce hosts the fourth dinner party in Leicester, and tries to impress his guests with a Spanish-inspired menu cooked in front of them. Entertainment is provided by Ryan's sister, West End actress Charlie Bruce, who puts the contestants through their paces in a salsa lesson(n)

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Double-glazing salesman Richard Deeping hosts the final dinner party in Leicester, and hopes to make up for his boisterous behaviour by impressing the guests with his culinary prowess. In a bid to land higher scores, he puts on his own brand of entertainment, only to reveal a little too much of himself in the process, before the winner of the £1,000 prize is announced(n)

programme.title: The Secret Life of the Zoo
programme.desc: Chester Zoo's keepers are busy making gifts for all the animals, but with chimp leader Dylan otherwise occupied by female attention, it is a chaotic free-for-all when the festive parcels are handed over to the chimps. Meanwhile, rhino couple Beni and Asha are experiencing family dysfunction, and when Asha ignores Beni, he is left to find solace in the company of a deer. Elsewhere, The zoo's new thousand-strong family of leaf cutter ants work together to build a new home for themselves out of their Christmas bounty(n)

programme.title: The Supervet
programme.desc: Professor Noel Fitzpatrick enters new territory when he is called upon to help a Humboldt penguin chick. Wall-e is from Longleat Safari Park in Wiltshire and needs an operation to cure his unhappy foot. He also treats a three-legged Maine Coon cat that needs help with a mysterious swelling in its back leg and a husky from Thailand undergoes hip surgery(n)

programme.title: 999: On the Frontline
programme.desc: Series following an hour in the life of ambulance crews in the West Midlands, starting with paramedic Chelsie Kennedy and technician Simon Lees rushing to save a baby, who they fight to resuscitate while rushing him to the nearest baby care unit. In Birmingham, paramedics Jo Hardwick and Peter Bowles treat a five-year-old boy who is having an asthma attack; and, across the city, student paramedic Dave Watts must attend his first cardiac arrest when an elderly woman is found in her bed without a pulse(n)

programme.title: Escape to the Chateau
programme.desc: Programme following Dick Strawbridge and Angel Adoree through the process of buying and restoring a French chateau that has been empty for the past four decades. Their new home has 12 acres of land, nine outbuildings, a walled garden and a moat - but it also has no electricity, heating or water, and proves to be a far more complicated DIY project than expected(n)

programme.title: The Team
programme.desc: To find the links between the trade in looted art and terrorism, the team works back through the chain of intermediaries and starts with the weakest link - Tebos Meyer. Back in Denmark, Malu seeks help from the police as the Syrian government exerts political pressure on the Danish authorities and demands Malu's extradition and the return of The Garden of Ishtar. Despite all this, Malu is determined to escape and take the artefact to a safe place. Crime thriller, with Jurgen Vogel. In English, German, Flemish, French and Danish(n)

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: Cyclist Stephen, who's 48, has severely damaged his ankle after coming off his bike deep in woodland in Surrey, and doctors treat a man rushed in after collapsing with a suspected stroke in his garden. Meanwhile, Bridget, who's 70, broke her wrist when she slipped on a mountain path in Greece(n)

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: Gary, 50, is brought into St George's hospital by ambulance after a garage collapsed and fell on his legs. His wife Peta joins him, while Maggie, 83, comes in to A&E with suspected sepsis. She's joined by her son and daughter, who also deal with the fact their mother has lung cancer. Plus, cameras follow one-year-old George, who is rushed in with his mother after drinking nail varnish remover(n)

programme.title: 8 Out of 10 Cats Does Countdown
programme.desc: Jimmy Carr invites Sean Lock and Isy Suttie to go up against Jon Richardson and Richard Osman in the comedy panel show's version of the words-and-numbers quiz. Alex Horne and the Horne Section join resident lexicographer Susie Dent in Dictionary Corner, while Rachel Riley looks after the numbers and letters(n)

programme.title: 999: On the Frontline

programme.title: Animal Airport
programme.desc: A pair of puppies gets stuck in transit, and there is confusion on the runway for Stuart. A cat from Siberia needs attention, and the centre reaches capacity as the kennels fill up(n)

programme.title: Food Unwrapped

programme.title: Kirstie's Handmade Christmas
programme.desc: Kirstie Allsopp makes a doll's house sure to delight any child, and finds out about tree decorating rituals from around the world(n)

programme.title: A Place in the Sun: Winter Sun
programme.desc: Retirement is fast approaching for Chris Wood and Eleanor Clements, who are looking for a holiday home on the coast of north Tenerife where they can spend the winter months. Scarlette Douglas shows them five properties, including some stunning cliff-top apartments, within their £120,000 budget(n)

programme.title: A Place in the Sun: Winter Sun
programme.desc: Ever since Terry Windle and Julia Lenart got together 15 years ago, they have dreamed of having their own place in sunnier climes - and have decided Gran Canaria is the perfect place for them. Scarlette Douglas shows them five properties for their £100,000 budget(n)

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The first visit of the week is to Tower View Hotel, in Blackpool, where owner Jennifer McGirr is joined by friend Diana Carnegie. Daniel Walker and George Gillespie find some unwanted guests in the bathroom and trouble arises at breakfast when some of the guests try ordering off-menu(n)

programme.title: Four in a Bed

Steve and Lisa Tindall seem impressed, but Jennifer and Diana Carnegie question the high price tag(n)

programme.title: Four in a Bed

They get into the swing of things with a round of blindfolded mini-golf, but not everyone gets a solid night's sleep afterwards(n)

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Former breakfast TV presenter Matt Arnold welcomes the contestants to The Bridge Hotel Brandon in Suffolk, and hopes that his mantra of 'beautiful beds, blissful bathrooms and brilliant breakfasts' shines through. The group takes part in a rowing competition in the afternoon, but delays at breakfast and a runny egg cause irritation(n)

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The hosts meet for the final time to find out what they have been paid and confront their critics, and things get heated when it's time to count up the cash(n)

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: On the first night in Kent, 51-year-old construction site manager and part-time bouncer Mark hopes that his dinner party can be as much about the party as it is about the dinner, as he hosts a cheesy fun-fuelled evening. Will party poppers, balloons, confetti cannons and surprising celebrity stories impress 53-year-old dog-lover Karen, 39-year-old Czech shop assistant Verush, 42-year-old singer Amrick and 58-year-old fashion photographer Anthony?(n)

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: On the second night in Kent, competitive sales assistant Verush is going all out to win by hosting a Czech-themed evening, but ex-stripper Mark isn't impressed, comparing Verush's pasta to MDF and pastry to leather, while the first night's argument between dog lover Karen and photographer Anthony is reignited(n)

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Dog enthusiast Karen hosts the third night of a week of dinner parties in Kent, hoping to impress her guests by serving up a menu inspired by her four-legged friends. After the cheesy fun of the previous night, she is determined to impress her guests(n)

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Amrick takes his turn to host in Kent, hoping to wow his guests by revealing his musical talents and with his traditional Indian cuisine. But with dog-lover Karen and competitive Verush not liking hot and spicy food, there could be trouble - while photographer Anthony questions ex-stripper Mark's dress sense(n)

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Photographer Anthony attempts to wow his guests with an evening of fine food and culinary excellence on the final day of the competition in Kent. However, the soiree is jeopardised by ex-stripper Mark on overdrive and dog-lover Karen showcasing some incredible impressions from animals to Anthony himself. The host might be cockily confident he can win, but Karen seemingly remains in pole position to bag the £1,000 prize(n)

programme.title: Escape to the Chateau
programme.desc: A look back at the transformation of Dick and Angel's 45-room chateau in France from abandoned ruin to sumptuous family home. The series begins by recalling the technical and engineering challenges they had to overcome to make it habitable for their young family. The couple remember their first winter together, when Dick's ingenious solutions were put to the test(n)

programme.title: Escape to the Chateau
programme.desc: The look back at the epic transformation of Dick Strawbridge and wife Angel's 45-room chateau continues, focusing on how Angel's creativity brought the chateau back to life, as walls were smashed, exquisitely designed rooms created and stunning bathroom suites installed(n)

programme.title: Escape to the Chateau
programme.desc: A look back at the transformation of Dick Strawbridge and his wife Angel's 45-room chateau from an abandoned ruin into a sumptuous family home. This episode looks back at how the abandoned walled garden stole Dick and Angel's hearts and how the family members fell for the country lifestyle, with their children growing up learning about seasons, livestock and wildlife(n)

programme.title: Emergency Helicopter Medics
programme.desc: In Hartlepool, the heli-medics are tasked with treating a man hit by a train, and cameras also follow cyclist Trevor, who suffers serious injuries after a collision with a car(n)

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: Thirty-one-year-old Alison is brought in after being kicked with such force by a horse that her leg was broken, while 12-year-old cyclist Harry is also treated for leg injuries, after being involved in a 10-bike pile-up at a velodrome. The staff at St George's also have to deal with 48-year-old Tony, who was riding pillion with his father when their motorbike was involved in a crash, leaving them both badly injured, with Tony having to be flown in to the hospital by emergency helicopter(n)

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: The documentary following patients being treated at St George's in south-west London reaches its 200th edition. Ky, 18, is brought in after being knocked off her motorbike in a hit-and-run, and her mum Sam is by her side as doctors assess the damage to her legs and pelvis. Aleks, 41, is suffering from confusion and memory loss after falling from her loft onto her head, and as her husband Paulo arrives at the hospital, medical staff are still unsure as to whether she has sustained permanent brain damage(n)

programme.title: Father Ted
programme.desc: This festive episode from 1996 finds the Craggy Island clerics and six other priests lost in what seems to be the world's largest lingerie department, with only Ted's quick thinking preventing the Catholic Church being rocked by a major scandal. His bravery earns him the coveted Golden Cleric award, which is when his troubles really begin. Comedy, starring Dermot Morgan, Ardal O'Hanlon and Frank Kelly(n)

programme.title: Father Ted
programme.desc: Craggy Island's most famous religious relic is due to be upgraded and Ted sets about trying to ensure the ceremony runs smoothly. However, Dougal and Jack put his plans in jeopardy when they meet the three priests in charge of proceedings. Comedy, starring Dermot Morgan(n)

programme.title: It Was Alright In
programme.desc: Matt Lucas narrates another look back at TV shows from the 1970s, focusing on the comedies, documentaries and public information films that made people so anxious 40 years ago. Some of the famous shows covered include Man Alive and Brass Tacks, as well as The Goodies taking on the police and June Whitfield burning her bra. The show features first-hand accounts from the people who were making telly at the time, including Barry Cryer, Janet Street-Porter and Bill Oddie(n)

programme.title: Animal Airport
programme.desc: A tiny puppy from Russia arouses suspicions about its age, a king vulture loses its temper as Ross tries to check its ID, and a very large dog arrives from South Africa(n)

programme.desc: Eccentric artist and student Jon Revell hosts the third dinner party of the week in south-east London, as he hopes to impress his fellow diners cooking up rare and bloody beef(n)

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Retired businessman Oliver Gillie hosts the final dinner party of the week in south-east London, after which the votes are counted and the winner is revealed(n)

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The first visit of the week is to Rooms 36 in the Lake District, owned by health-conscious Andy Peters, who is joined by his friend, fellow B&B owner Jeronime Palmer(n)

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Mother and son team Trish and Connor Richardson host at the Red Lion Coaching Inn near Gainsborough, where Julie and James are not impressed by the dated bathrooms(n)

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Julie and James host at the Schiehallion Hotel in Aberfeldy, where the guests are impressed by their rooms, but once again luxury lovers Andy and Jeronime want more from their beds(n)

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The last visit of the week is to Townhead Hotel in Lockerbie, owned by Stephen Montgomery, where the high level of finish in the rooms surprises all of the guests(n)

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Andy and Jeronime from Rooms 36 want to find out why their luxury B&B didn't hit the mark as the B&B owners meet for the last time to settle some scores(n)

programme.title: Escape to the Chateau
programme.desc: Dick Strawbridge and Angel Adoree continue their renovation of a French chateau, 18 months after the end of the first series. So far, only nine rooms have been renovated and many areas of the 12-acre estate have yet to be looked at - but the project is going to have to start paying for itself soon. They make plans to host weddings on the grounds, while looking ahead to keeping livestock and growing their own crops. Dick takes steps to generate solar power during a hot summer, and turns an old oil tank into a pig roaster(n)

programme.title: Escape to the Chateau
programme.desc: Fresh from the success of hosting a three-day wedding at the chateau, Dick and Angel make business plans for the grounds, intending to charge people to fish in the moat and forage in the woods. Angel starts work on a second guest suite, but also wants to install an elevator, which pushes Dick's engineering skills to the limit(n)

programme.title: Escape to the Chateau
programme.desc: Dick Strawbridge and Angel Adoree await the arrival of their guests, who are expecting a luxurious Christmas at the chateau. Dick continues work on installing the lift, but the project tests his ingenuity to the limit, while Angel finds more valuables in the attic, including a collection of vinyl records(n)

programme.title: The Storms That Stole Christmas
programme.desc: Trees were felled, trains were cancelled, Gatwick Airport was in chaos and 50,000 homeowners made do without power. This documentary, the first of two telling the stories of those who bore the brunt of the bad weather over Christmas 2013 and the surrounding period, features amateur footage, eyewitness testimony and expert commentary(n)

programme.title: Emergency Helicopter Medics
programme.desc: In Yorkshire, a man requires urgent medical care after falling from his motorbike. The medics scramble to the Lake District when a walker goes into a cardiac arrest on Ullswater(n)

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: Adam is brought in by ambulance after being involved in a high-speed motorcycle accident. The injured 20-year-old joined by his dad and sister. Meanwhile, Richard, aged 70, arrives at A&E with a high heart rate, and 10-year-old Pia is brought in by her mum after falling over and hurting her knee(n)

programme.title: 999: What's Your Emergency?
programme.desc: The documentary focuses on the demands placed on the women and men who answer people's cries for help. As an ambulance crew answers a call to a heart attack, call handlers guide the victim's daughter through administering CPR. A nine-year-old boy is coached through a terrifying situation when his mother suffers a diabetic emergency while driving, and a father-to-be is instructed how to deliver his baby over the phone(n)

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: A chance to buy goods from the comfort of home(n)

programme.title: James May's Cars of the People
programme.desc: James charts the history of 4x4 vehicles from the jeeps of the Second World war onwards, revealing how they rose in popularity in everyday use and in rallies. He explores the rivalry between Land Rover and Land Cruiser, and puts some classic vehicles through their paces by driving up Mount Fuji and through the Mojave desert(n)

programme.title: American Pickers
programme.desc: The items Mike and Frank bought in Europe arrive in the US, and the guys also visit a vintage car company(n)

programme.title: Storage Hunters UK
programme.desc: In the penultimate episode, an unlikely pairing enrages bidders in Birmingham, Linda is determined to keep her game face on despite Dan's jibes, and Nat and John are at each other's throats. Sean Kelly hosts(n)

programme.title: Storage Hunters UK
programme.desc: Sparks are flying in Royston, Hertfordshire, and not just amongst the bidders as the contents of a bin goes up in smoke, and a mystery object under tarp causes a cat-fight. Sean's flying skills are put to the test and Nat and John take a gamble on a double unit - but will it pay off?(n)

programme.title: American Pickers
programme.desc: Mike and Frank get off the road for a behind-the-scenes look back at their most memorable moments together, featuring their dustiest adventures and most amazing discoveries(n)

programme.title: American Pickers
programme.desc: There are more problems for Mike Wolfe and Frank Fritz as they attempt to retrieve an iconic American sports car that is so rare they have never even heard of it(n)

programme.title: James May's Cars of the People
programme.desc: James looks at some of the advances in motoring that never caught on, revealing how the petrol engine came to dominate in the 20th century, while concepts for jet engines and steam power fell by the wayside. He also drives an amphibious car and an electric scooter, and takes a ride in the world's fastest driverless car(n)

programme.title: World's Most Dangerous Roads
programme.desc: Rhod Gilbert and Greg Davies negotiate a variety of unusual hazards as they travel through Nepal, a country with one of the world's highest rates of road traffic accidents. Frequent floods and landslides mean car journeys are often fraught with danger, and matters are not helped by the varied states of Nepalese roads, which range from urban highways to crumbling mountain passes(n)

programme.title: Top Gear
programme.desc: The hosts bid to prove that cars can be art by filling a gallery in Middlesbrough with motoring-related works, including a few creations of their own. They also resort to unusual promotional techniques to attract more visitors to their exhibition. Back on the track, Jeremy Clarkson tests British supercar the Noble M600. Jenson Button drives the Reasonably Priced Car(n)

programme.title: Timber Kings
programme.desc: Bryan Sr and Joel brave the British Columbia backwoods to save a historic cabin, and Beat cooks up an outdoor log kitchen. Meanwhile, Peter builds a dream retreat(n)

programme.title: Cop Car Workshop
programme.desc: John Heussi and his team work on a high-performance BMW 330, the Interceptor, while a shortage of staff sees Dave manning the phones(n)

programme.title: Top Gear
programme.desc: Jeremy Clarkson spares no expense when he tests the BMW X6. James May joins Margaret Calvert, one of Britain's road-sign designers, to test-drive the Vauxhall Insignia VXR, and Richard Hammond tries out a £340,000 Lexus supercar. Plus, musician Seasick Steve is the Star in a Reasonably Priced Car(n)

programme.title: Eddie Eats America
programme.desc: Eddie Hall visits Fort Worth, Texas, where he takes on a monster pancake challenge, a painful rodeo test, and local delicacy calves' testes in the world's largest Honky Tonk venue(n)

programme.title: Eddie Eats America
programme.desc: Eddie hits San Antonio to sample the finest Tex-Mex food and a gigantic chicken fried steak - with no chicken. He also tests whether he has the moves for TV show Ninja Warrior(n)

programme.title: Would I Lie to You?
programme.desc: Comedy panel show, hosted by Rob Brydon, in which team captains David Mitchell and Lee Mack are joined by celebrity guests Denise Lewis, Richard Osman, Robert Rinder and Katherine Ryan to hoodwink their opponents with absurd facts and plausible lies about themselves(n)

programme.title: Would I Lie to You?

programme.title: QI
programme.desc: Christmas special from 2004, with Alan Davies, Rich Hall, Mark Steel and Phill Jupitus facing the questions. As ever, host Stephen Fry will only award points for answers he finds interesting(n)

programme.title: QI
programme.desc: Phill Jupitus, Cally Beaton and Rhod Gilbert join regular panellist Alan Davies and host Sandi Toksvig for an unconventional look at a potpourri of topics, while facing some impossible questions. As ever, correctness and even intelligence go out of the window, as the fiendishly difficult questions lead to points being awarded for the answers its questionmaster finds most interesting, as opposed to correct(n)

programme.title: Red Dwarf
programme.desc: Lister loses Rimmer in a game of poker to a group of biologically engineered life forms, while Kryten and Cat become quantum entangled and do everything in perfect unison. Comedy series, starring Craig Charles, Chris Barrie, Robert Llewellyn and Danny John-Jules(n)

programme.title: Red Dwarf
programme.desc: Lister experiences romantic difficulties when he receives a letter from an ex-lover, and finds himself in a love triangle between Snack Dispensers 23 and 34. Sci-fi comedy, starring Craig Charles, Robert Llewellyn and Danny John-Jules(n)

programme.title: Red Dwarf
programme.desc: The Dwarfers face disaster when they are surrounded by a Simulant Death Ship and a fleet of Annihilators while hiding in an asteroid, and it is up to Arnold J Rimmer to save them. Comedy series, starring Craig Charles, Chris Barrie and Robert Llewellyn(n)

programme.title: Expedition with Steve Backshall
programme.desc: The naturalist ventures into uncharted territory in pursuit of new discoveries. He takes on physical challenges, encounters extraordinary wildlife and meets remarkable people. In the first edition, Steve and a team of climbers and jungle survival experts head into the ancient landscape of South America's Guiana Shield. This vast wilderness of pristine forests and towering table-top mountains is one of the most inaccessible terrains on the planet(n)

programme.title: Expedition with Steve Backshall
programme.desc: In the Jebel Akhdar mountain range of Oman, Steve leads an expedition into an unexplored desert canyon. With temperatures soaring, dehydration and heat stroke are a constant threat(n)

programme.desc: The 2018 edition of the series in which teams of amateur racers test out their homemade, gravity-powered soapboxes on obstacle-littered courses in Johannesburg, South Africa. The entrants create vehicles without engines and race downhill in this popular offbeat event(n)

programme.title: Top Gear
programme.desc: Jeremy Clarkson, James May and Richard Hammond travel to Africa, where they are challenged to buy a second-hand car costing less than £1,500 and in no way designed to go off-road, and drive across Botswana. Along the way they must negotiate salt pans, rivers and reserves full of animals while facing sweltering heat and suffocating dust(n)

programme.title: Top Gear

Arriving in Vietnam, they are challenged to travel the entire length of the country in just eight days. First they must buy suitable transport for the journey, and despite having several million Dong in their pockets, this proves more difficult than they expected, especially in one of the most expensive car markets in the world(n)

programme.desc: John Bishop narrates an alphabetical romp through the series' most memorable stunts and features as former hosts Jeremy Clarkson, Richard Hammond and James May pushed vehicles of all shapes and sizes to their limits. With 22 seasons of the show, there was no shortage of material to choose from as the likes of Tom Cruise and Cameron Diaz attempted to be the fastest Star in a Reasonably Priced Car, and the presenters risked life and limb in their assorted globe-trotting adventures(n)

programme.title: Top Gear
programme.desc: The conclusion of the two-part special in which Jeremy Clarkson, Richard Hammond and James May take three used, V8-engined sports cars on a gruelling road trip covering 1,600 miles through Patagonia to the world's southernmost city. Having encountered stunning landscapes, mechanical mishaps and dreadful roads on their journey through Argentina, the trio's adventure is brought to a dramatic climax by a terrifying turn of events(n)

programme.desc: The teams take on one of the steepest courses in Red Bull Soapbox Race history in Lithuania. Will the soapboxes cope with the water jump and savage bone-rattler?(n)

programme.title: World's Most Dangerous Roads
programme.desc: Hugh Dennis and David Baddiel travel along more than 1,200 miles of hazardous roads in Ethiopia on a journey to Aksum, the country's holiest place. However, they have to contend with more than fatigue and unreliable terrain to reach their destination, as they encounter drug-taking truck drivers, suffer a disastrous breakdown and start to run out of fuel at the worst possible time(n)

programme.title: QI XL
programme.desc: Sandi Toksvig hosts an extended version of the quiz in which Jason Manford, Romesh Ranganathan and Holly Walsh join regular participant Alan Davies to vie for points awarded for interesting - if not always correct - answers.
